```tsx
const LegendPosition = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={stdData} colorPalette="swamps">
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x2"
        y0Accessor="y2"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x3"
        y0Accessor="y3"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="categorical" position="left" />
      <XYChart.Legend position="bottom" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


##### Legend ratio

By default, the legend occupies `25%` of the container width, in the case where
the legend is positioned on the right and `25%` of the container height if the
legend position is on the bottom.

It is possible to override the default legend ratio by setting a custom
percentage value for the `ratio` prop. The expected value is in the range of
`5-80`. Values out of expected ranges will roll back to the default legend
ratio.

```tsx
<XYChart data={positiveZeroBaseline} colorPalette="fireplace" height={350}>
  <XYChart.RectSeries
    xAxisId="x-first-axis"
    yAxisId="y-first-axis"
    x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
    x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
    y0Accessor="vertical.start"
    y1Accessor="vertical.end"
    valueAccessor="value"
  />
  <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
  <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
  <XYChart.Legend position="bottom" initialRatio={10} />
</XYChart>
```

```tsx
<XYChart data={positiveZeroBaseline} colorPalette="fireplace" height={350}>
  <XYChart.RectSeries
    xAxisId="x-first-axis"
    yAxisId="y-first-axis"
    x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
    x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
    y0Accessor="vertical.start"
    y1Accessor="vertical.end"
    valueAccessor="value"
  />
  <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
  <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
  <XYChart.Legend position="bottom" initialRatio={10} />
</XYChart>
```


#### Empty state

The EmptyState subcomponent serves as a fallback when there is no data available
to display in a chart. Its purpose is to provide a user-friendly way of
informing the user about the current situation. When there is no data, a
fallback UI is displayed occupying the full width and height of the chart, along
with a default message.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const EmptyState = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.EmptyState>No data to display</XYChart.EmptyState>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="amountRange.start"
        x1Accessor="amountRange.end"
        y0Accessor="peopleRange.start"
        y1Accessor="peopleRange.end"
        valueAccessor="events"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const EmptyState = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.EmptyState>No data to display</XYChart.EmptyState>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="amountRange.start"
        x1Accessor="amountRange.end"
        y0Accessor="peopleRange.start"
        y1Accessor="peopleRange.end"
        valueAccessor="events"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Error state

The `ErrorState` subcomponent is responsible for handling errors in a graceful
manner, ultimately improving the overall user experience. Its primary function
is to catch any errors that may occur with the data and display a fallback UI
instead of crashing the entire application. The fallback UI occupies the full
width and height of the chart, ensuring that users are still provided with a
meaningful interface even in the presence of errors.

```tsx
<XYChart data={numericalDataset}>
  <XYChart.ErrorState>{(error) => <p>custom: {error}</p>}</XYChart.ErrorState>
  <XYChart.RectSeries
    xAxisId="non-existent-id"
    yAxisId="y-first-axis"
    x0Accessor="amountRange.start"
    x1Accessor="amountRange.end"
    y0Accessor="peopleRange.start"
    y1Accessor="peopleRange.end"
    valueAccessor="events"
  />
  {/* LINE */}
  <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
  <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
</XYChart>
```

```tsx
<XYChart data={numericalDataset}>
  <XYChart.ErrorState>{(error) => <p>custom: {error}</p>}</XYChart.ErrorState>
  <XYChart.RectSeries
    xAxisId="non-existent-id"
    yAxisId="y-first-axis"
    x0Accessor="amountRange.start"
    x1Accessor="amountRange.end"
    y0Accessor="peopleRange.start"
    y1Accessor="peopleRange.end"
    valueAccessor="events"
  />
  {/* LINE */}
  <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
  <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
</XYChart>
```


#### Loading state

The `loading` property is a boolean value that can be passed to the `XYChart`
component to control its loading state. When the loading prop is set to true,
the loading indicator appears in the middle of the chart plot to inform the user
that the component is currently fetching or processing data. When the loading
prop is set to false, the component should display its regular content.

```tsx
<XYChart data={numericalDataset} loading>
  <XYChart.RectSeries
    xAxisId="x-first-axis"
    yAxisId="y-first-axis"
    x0Accessor="amountRange.start"
    x1Accessor="amountRange.end"
    y0Accessor="peopleRange.start"
    y1Accessor="peopleRange.end"
    valueAccessor="events"
  />
  <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
  <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
</XYChart>
```

```tsx
<XYChart data={numericalDataset} loading>
  <XYChart.RectSeries
    xAxisId="x-first-axis"
    yAxisId="y-first-axis"
    x0Accessor="amountRange.start"
    x1Accessor="amountRange.end"
    y0Accessor="peopleRange.start"
    y1Accessor="peopleRange.end"
    valueAccessor="events"
  />
  <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
  <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
</XYChart>
```


#### Chart Interactions

The `XYChart` provides various interactions (e.g. zoom-x, zoom in, zoom out, and
pan) that are enabled all by default. See
chart interactions for more details.

##### Zoom and Pan

Every X-axis can opt-in or out of having the zoom and pan enabled. This also
applies regardless of the position (top, bottom). To disable these interactions,
`disableZoom` and `disablePan` can be specified as props for the `XAxis`
subcomponent.

As soon as there's one X-axis with zoom, the controls and interactions are
enabled. When performing any zoom interaction, it affects to all the X-axis
with also zoom enabled.

Categorical axis are excluded and will never be zoomed or panned.

##### onZoomChange

You can subscribe to changes on interactions made on X-axis in the `XYChart` by
specifying a callback `onZoomChange` for the `XAxis` subcomponent. See
chart interactions to know all possibilities.

##### Infinite Zoom

The infinite zoom provides a way to zoom and pan without limits. This way, the
boundaries set by the current domain will be bypassed.

If the customer enables the feature and exceeds the data domain, the chart won't
show any data unless the consumer provides new ones for the new domain.

This feature can be enabled by defining `infiniteZoom` prop for the desired
`XAxis` subcomponent.

##### Initial and Current zoom

A chart's domain is determined by its data, and each axis can define its scale
boundaries by a `min` and `max` property as explained
here. However, there's a way to set the
`initialZoom` (min, max) of the chart by setting this property on the desired
`XAxis` subcomponent. This will cause the chart to display plot information at
this initial specified domain, no matter the dataset used. There's another
property called `currentZoom` (min, max) that can also be combined with the
`initialZoom` to perform other more advanced actions, like synchronized zoom
between Charts.

The priority in which these properties are being considered for plotting the
information on the chart is the following:

- `currentZoom` (Highest priority)

- `initialZoom`

- Custom min/max on axis

- Domain derived from data (Lowest priority)

#### Toolbar

The toolbar is one of the ways to visually interact with the chart. In the
`XYChart`, it's displayed by default, but in order to customize it, a
`XYChart.Toolbar` subcomponent must be added. This subcomponent supports
`hidden`, `draggable`, `placement` and `collapsed` props.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const rectData = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 10,
  },

  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 30,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 20,
      end: 30,
    },
    value: 50,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 30,
      end: 40,
    },
    value: 100,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 20,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 50,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 20,
      end: 30,
    },
    value: 40,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 30,
      end: 40,
    },
    value: 20,
  },
];

const ToolbarOptionalProps = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        data={rectData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
      <XYChart.Legend hidden />
      {/* eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-deprecated */}
      <XYChart.Toolbar collapsed placement="bottom-left" draggable={false} />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx

const rectData = [
  {

const ToolbarOptionalProps = () => {

      <XYChart.RectSeries
        data={rectData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"

```


##### Behavioral tracking

The `XYChart.Toolbar` subcomponent supports behavioral tracking attributes that
are spread onto the toolbar root element. This allows tracking of toolbar
interactions such as menu opens, zoom/pan mode changes, and download actions.

Pass any `data-dt-*` attributes directly on `XYChart.Toolbar` to attach tracking
metadata. See `BehaviorTrackingProps` for the full list of supported attributes.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const lineData = [
  { x: 0, y: 10, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 1, y: 30, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 2, y: 20, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 3, y: 50, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 4, y: 40, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 5, y: 60, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
];

const ToolbarBehaviorTracking = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={lineData}
        x0Accessor="x"
        y0Accessor="y"
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
        nameAccessor="name"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
      <XYChart.Toolbar
        data-dt-name="xy-chart-toolbar"
        data-dt-features="chart-toolbar"
        data-dt-properties='{"chart-type": "xy-chart"}'
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const lineData = [
  { x: 0, y: 10, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 1, y: 30, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 2, y: 20, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 3, y: 50, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 4, y: 40, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
  { x: 5, y: 60, seriesId: 's1', name: 'Series 1' },
];

const ToolbarBehaviorTracking = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={lineData}
        x0Accessor="x"
        y0Accessor="y"
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
        nameAccessor="name"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
      <XYChart.Toolbar
        data-dt-name="xy-chart-toolbar"
        data-dt-features="chart-toolbar"
        data-dt-properties='{"chart-type": "xy-chart"}'
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Download data as CSV

The `XYChart` component supports download data in CSV format using a toolbar
button; this is enabled by default in the toolbar.

Each series that derives from `XYChart` have their own accessors. There are
accessors with the same names and accessors exclusive to a variant. When
downloading the data in a CSV, the columns will be the `series` followed by all
the accessors of all series variants, even if they are not included in the chart
itself.

The values of accessors in series that are not used in are null.

The accessors and their meanings are:

- `series` - the type and number of the series.

- `x0` - the value corresponding to the data from the x0 accessor.

- `x1` - the value corresponding to the data from the x1 accessor.

- `y0` - the value corresponding to the data from the y0 accessor.

- `y1` - the value corresponding to the data from the y1 accessor.

- `value` - `Rect exclusive` - the value corresponding to the data from the
valueAccessor.

It's also possible to programmatically trigger the download of the CSV file via
the `downloadData` function in the `XYChartRef`.

```tsx
import { useRef } from 'react';

import { Button } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/buttons';
import { XYChart, XYChartRef } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { DownloadIcon } from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const rectData = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 10,
  },

  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 30,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 20,
      end: 30,
    },
    value: 50,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 30,
      end: 40,
    },
    value: 100,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 20,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 50,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 20,
      end: 30,
    },
    value: 40,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 30,
      end: 40,
    },
    value: 20,
  },
];

const DownloadCsvProgrammatically = () => {
  const chartRef = useRef<XYChartRef>(null);

  const downloadData = () => {
    chartRef.current?.downloadData();
  };

  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={downloadData}>
        <Button.Prefix>
          <DownloadIcon />
        </Button.Prefix>
        Download Data
      </Button>

      <XYChart ref={chartRef} data={[]}>
        <XYChart.RectSeries
          data={rectData}
          xAxisId="x-first-axis"
          yAxisId="y-first-axis"
          x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
          x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
          y0Accessor="vertical.start"
          y1Accessor="vertical.end"
          valueAccessor="value"
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
        <XYChart.Legend hidden />
      </XYChart>
    </>
  );
};
```

#### Intent options

The `XYChart` supports intent options in the toolbar. The intents appear in the
toolbar's dropdown menu, allowing users to perform actions such as sharing a
chart or viewing data in another application. When a single intent is configured
and no download button is shown, the intent appears directly in the toolbar.
When multiple intents are configured, or when both an intent and a download
button are present, they are grouped under a More options submenu. To add
intent options to a `XYChart`, use the `XYChart.Intent` subcomponent:

##### Intent properties

- `payload`: An object containing the data to be passed to the target app. The
structure depends on the target application's requirements.

- `options`: Configuration options for the intent.

- `keyProperties`: Array of properties that should be included as keys in the
intent.

- `recommendedAppId`: Suggested target application ID.

- `recommendedIntentId`: Suggested intent ID.

- `responseProperties`: Array of properties to be included in the response.

- `icon`: Optional custom icon to be displayed next to the intent option.

- `onResponse`: Optional callback function that is called when a response is
received from the target app.

##### Examples

The following examples demonstrate different intent options in XYChart:

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { LineChartIcon, UfoIcon } from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const rectData = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 10,
  },

  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 30,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 20,
      end: 30,
    },
    value: 50,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: -10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 30,
      end: 40,
    },
    value: 100,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 20,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 50,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 20,
      end: 30,
    },
    value: 40,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: -10,
      end: -20,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 30,
      end: 40,
    },
    value: 20,
  },
];

const sampleQuery =
  'data record(timestamp = now() - 1h, cpu_usage = random() * 100), record(timestamp = now() - 45m, cpu_usage = random() * 100), record(timestamp = now() - 30m, cpu_usage = random() * 100), record(timestamp = now() - 15m, cpu_usage = random() * 100), record(timestamp = now(), cpu_usage = random() * 100) | makeTimeseries interval:15m, cpu_usage = avg(cpu_usage)';

const IntentOptions = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={rectData}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis
        id="x-first-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="bottom"
        min="data-min"
        max="data-max"
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis
        id="y-first-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="left"
        min="data-min"
        max="data-max"
      />
      <XYChart.Legend hidden />
      <XYChart.Intent
        payload={{
          'dt.query': 'fetch logs',
        }}
        options={{
          keyProperties: [],
        }}
        icon={<LineChartIcon />}
      >
        View logs
      </XYChart.Intent>
      <XYChart.Intent
        payload={{
          'dt.query': sampleQuery,
        }}
        options={{
          recommendedAppId: 'dynatrace.notebooks',
          recommendedIntentId: 'view-query',
        }}
        icon={<UfoIcon />}
      >
        Edit in notebook
      </XYChart.Intent>
      <XYChart.Intent
        payload={{
          'dt.query': sampleQuery,
        }}
        options={{
          recommendedAppId: 'dynatrace.dashboards',
          recommendedIntentId: 'add-query-to-dashboard',
        }}
      >
        Pin to dashboard
      </XYChart.Intent>
      <XYChart.Intent
        payload={{ 'dt.query': sampleQuery }}
        options={{
          keyProperties: [],
        }}
      >
        Open with ...
      </XYChart.Intent>
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

#### Styling

The `XYChart` also accepts custom styling, which can be set using the properties
`className` and `style` as in a regular html element.

#### Annotations

Annotations are used to visualize specific events or contextual notes on the
`XYChart` in the form of markers placed in time-based or numerical-based tracks.

The marker represents an annotation at a certain point. They can be either a
value (a certain time or number) or a range (from-to object), depending on the
data provided to the Annotation. Annotations within the same
timestamp/timeframe/number are grouped together under a single marker that
displays the number of grouped annotations. Markers can be displayed on a single
or multiple tracks. When there are more than three tracks, an overflow scroll is
applied.

##### Add annotations to the chart

In order to visualize annotation data inside the `XYChart`, a
`XYChart.Annotations` component should be initialized. This component should
have at least one track, that contains a marker component per annotation data
point.

The data provided to the `XYChart.Annotations` component via the `data` property
is combined with the defined accessors to generate the corresponding tracks and
markers. Also a mandatory `xAxisId` is required to match with the corresponding
`XYChart.XAxis`, which can be either the bottom or the top one.

The `XYChartAnnotations.Track` should have a unique track ID (`trackIdAccessor`)
that will be used to match all the markers that belong to that specific track.
Additional optional parameters include: `labelAccessor`, `colorAccessor`,
`symbol`, `indicatorDisplay` and `hidden`.

An annotation data point `XYChartAnnotations.Marker` should have a unique track
ID (`trackByAccessor`) that will be used to match the track it belongs.
Additional parameters include some which are mandatory `startAccessor` and
`endAccessor`, and an optional `symbol`, `titleAccessor`, `descriptionAccessor`,
`colorAccessor` and `priority`, which will be displayed in the tooltip.

```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react';

import {
  XYChart,
  XYChartAnnotations,
  type IndicatorsDisplay,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { Flex } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/layouts';
import Colors from '@dynatrace/strato-design-tokens/colors';
import {
  DynatraceIcon,
  ExploitIcon,
  ExploitOffIcon,
  IdeaIcon,
  ResearchIcon,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const symbols = {
  idea: <IdeaIcon />,
  research: <ResearchIcon />,
  dtLogo: <DynatraceIcon />,
  exploit: <ExploitIcon />,
  exploitOff: <ExploitOffIcon />,
};

const dotData = [
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 0, y: 0 },
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 500, y: 1000 },
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 0, y: 1000 },
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 500, y: 0 },

const AnnotationsData = () => {
  return (
    <Flex gap={32} flexDirection="column">
      <XYChart data={dotData}>
        <XYChart.Annotations
          data={annotationsNumericalData}
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
        >
          <XYChartAnnotations.Track
            trackIdAccessor="trackLabel"
            labelAccessor="trackLabel"
            colorAccessor="trackColor"
            symbol={
              (({ trackSymbol }: { trackSymbol: string }) => {
                if (typeof trackSymbol === 'string' && trackSymbol in symbols) {
                  return symbols[trackSymbol as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return trackSymbol;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({
                trackIndicatorDisplay,
              }: {
                trackIndicatorDisplay: IndicatorsDisplay;
              }) => trackIndicatorDisplay) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ trackHidden }: { trackHidden: boolean }) => trackHidden) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
          />
          <XYChartAnnotations.Marker
            startAccessor="markerStart"
            endAccessor="markerEnd"
            trackByAccessor="trackLabel"
            descriptionAccessor="markerDescription"
            colorAccessor="markerColor"
            titleAccessor="markerTitle"
            symbol={
              (({ markerIcon }: { markerIcon: string }) => {
                if (typeof markerIcon === 'string' && markerIcon in symbols) {
                  return symbols[markerIcon as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return markerIcon;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({ showIndicator }: { showIndicator: IndicatorsDisplay }) =>
                showIndicator) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ showMarker }: { showMarker: boolean }) => !showMarker) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
            priority={
              (({ markerPriority }: { markerPriority: number }) =>
                markerPriority) as (t: unknown) => number
            }
          />
        </XYChart.Annotations>
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
          yAxisId="y-left-axis"
          x0Accessor="x"
          y0Accessor="y"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
        />
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          colorPalette="pink"
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
          yAxisId="y-right-axis"
          x0Accessor="subX"
          y0Accessor="subY"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-right-axis" type="numerical" position="right" />

        <XYChart.Legend hidden />
      </XYChart>

      <XYChart data={rectData}>
        <XYChart.Annotations
          data={annotationsNumericalData}
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
        >
          <XYChartAnnotations.Track
            trackIdAccessor="trackLabel"
            labelAccessor="trackLabel"
            colorAccessor="trackColor"
            symbol={
              (({ trackSymbol }: { trackSymbol: string }) => {
                if (typeof trackSymbol === 'string' && trackSymbol in symbols) {
                  const key = trackSymbol;
                  return symbols[key as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return trackSymbol;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({
                trackIndicatorDisplay,
              }: {
                trackIndicatorDisplay: IndicatorsDisplay;
              }) => trackIndicatorDisplay) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ trackHidden }: { trackHidden: boolean }) => trackHidden) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
          />
          <XYChartAnnotations.Marker
            startAccessor="markerStart"
            endAccessor="markerEnd"
            trackByAccessor="trackLabel"
            descriptionAccessor="markerDescription"
            colorAccessor="markerColor"
            titleAccessor="markerTitle"
            symbol={
              (({ markerIcon }: { markerIcon: string }) => {
                if (typeof markerIcon === 'string' && markerIcon in symbols) {
                  return symbols[markerIcon as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return markerIcon;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({ showIndicator }: { showIndicator: IndicatorsDisplay }) =>
                showIndicator) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ showMarker }: { showMarker: boolean }) => !showMarker) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
            priority={
              (({ markerPriority }: { markerPriority: number }) =>
                markerPriority) as (t: unknown) => number
            }
          />
        </XYChart.Annotations>

        <XYChart.RectSeries
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
          yAxisId="y-left-axis"
          x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
          x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
          y0Accessor="vertical.start"
          y1Accessor="vertical.end"
          valueAccessor="value"
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
        <XYChart.Legend hidden />
      </XYChart>
    </Flex>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react';

import {
  XYChart,
  XYChartAnnotations,
  type IndicatorsDisplay,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { Flex } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/layouts';
import Colors from '@dynatrace/strato-design-tokens/colors';
import {
  DynatraceIcon,
  ExploitIcon,
  ExploitOffIcon,
  IdeaIcon,
  ResearchIcon,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const symbols = {
  idea: <IdeaIcon />,
  research: <ResearchIcon />,
  dtLogo: <DynatraceIcon />,
  exploit: <ExploitIcon />,
  exploitOff: <ExploitOffIcon />,
};

const dotData = [
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 0, y: 0 },
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 500, y: 1000 },
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 0, y: 1000 },

  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 23.678, y: 78.456 },

  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 67.234, y: 89.89 },
  { seriesName: 'blue-series-name', x: 89.567, y: 12.234 },

  {
    trackLabel: 'Track 1',

const AnnotationsData = () => {
  return (
    <Flex gap={32} flexDirection="column">
      <XYChart data={dotData}>
        <XYChart.Annotations
          data={annotationsNumericalData}
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
        >
          <XYChartAnnotations.Track
            trackIdAccessor="trackLabel"
            labelAccessor="trackLabel"
            colorAccessor="trackColor"
            symbol={
              (({ trackSymbol }: { trackSymbol: string }) => {
                if (typeof trackSymbol === 'string' && trackSymbol in symbols) {
                  return symbols[trackSymbol as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return trackSymbol;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({
                trackIndicatorDisplay,
              }: {
                trackIndicatorDisplay: IndicatorsDisplay;
              }) => trackIndicatorDisplay) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ trackHidden }: { trackHidden: boolean }) => trackHidden) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
          />
          <XYChartAnnotations.Marker
            startAccessor="markerStart"
            endAccessor="markerEnd"
            trackByAccessor="trackLabel"
            descriptionAccessor="markerDescription"
            colorAccessor="markerColor"
            titleAccessor="markerTitle"
            symbol={
              (({ markerIcon }: { markerIcon: string }) => {
                if (typeof markerIcon === 'string' && markerIcon in symbols) {
                  return symbols[markerIcon as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return markerIcon;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({ showIndicator }: { showIndicator: IndicatorsDisplay }) =>
                showIndicator) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ showMarker }: { showMarker: boolean }) => !showMarker) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
            priority={
              (({ markerPriority }: { markerPriority: number }) =>
                markerPriority) as (t: unknown) => number
            }
          />
        </XYChart.Annotations>
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
          yAxisId="y-left-axis"
          x0Accessor="x"
          y0Accessor="y"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
        />
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          colorPalette="pink"
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
          yAxisId="y-right-axis"
          x0Accessor="subX"
          y0Accessor="subY"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-right-axis" type="numerical" position="right" />

        <XYChart.Legend hidden />
      </XYChart>

      <XYChart data={rectData}>
        <XYChart.Annotations
          data={annotationsNumericalData}
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
        >
          <XYChartAnnotations.Track
            trackIdAccessor="trackLabel"
            labelAccessor="trackLabel"
            colorAccessor="trackColor"
            symbol={
              (({ trackSymbol }: { trackSymbol: string }) => {
                if (typeof trackSymbol === 'string' && trackSymbol in symbols) {
                  const key = trackSymbol;
                  return symbols[key as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return trackSymbol;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({
                trackIndicatorDisplay,
              }: {
                trackIndicatorDisplay: IndicatorsDisplay;
              }) => trackIndicatorDisplay) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ trackHidden }: { trackHidden: boolean }) => trackHidden) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
          />
          <XYChartAnnotations.Marker
            startAccessor="markerStart"
            endAccessor="markerEnd"
            trackByAccessor="trackLabel"
            descriptionAccessor="markerDescription"
            colorAccessor="markerColor"
            titleAccessor="markerTitle"
            symbol={
              (({ markerIcon }: { markerIcon: string }) => {
                if (typeof markerIcon === 'string' && markerIcon in symbols) {
                  return symbols[markerIcon as keyof typeof symbols];
                }
                return markerIcon;
              }) as (t: unknown) => ReactNode
            }
            indicatorsDisplay={
              (({ showIndicator }: { showIndicator: IndicatorsDisplay }) =>
                showIndicator) as (t: unknown) => IndicatorsDisplay
            }
            hidden={
              (({ showMarker }: { showMarker: boolean }) => !showMarker) as (
                t: unknown
              ) => boolean
            }
            priority={
              (({ markerPriority }: { markerPriority: number }) =>
                markerPriority) as (t: unknown) => number
            }
          />
        </XYChart.Annotations>

        <XYChart.RectSeries
          xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
          yAxisId="y-left-axis"
          x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
          x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
          y0Accessor="vertical.start"
          y1Accessor="vertical.end"
          valueAccessor="value"
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
        <XYChart.Legend hidden />
      </XYChart>
    </Flex>
  );
};
```


##### Marker content

When the `symbol` is provided, it will become the marker content by default.
When not, the data obtained through `titleAccessor` will be shown as marker
content.

In case the content of the marker is bigger than the size of the marker, it will
expand to fit all the content inside, decoupling from the original scale. In
these particular cases, it is encouraged to use the indicators, which will
represent the real size of the bin.

##### Visual customization

Tracks and markers support visual customization in order to differentiate
various types of annotations.

It's possible to set custom colors on both the track (to be applied to all
markers) and the marker level by using the data obtained through `colorAccessor`
property on the respective component. A marker's custom color has precedence
over track's. This color can be set to any `Design System color token`, as well
as any `rgb`, `hex` or `CSS color`.

The `symbol` property allows you to apply an icon, emoji, single letter, glyph,
or Design System icon to either an individual marker or to an entire track. When
applied to a track, this `symbol` will be used as the default.

When markers partially overlap one another, the order of the annotations defines
which marker is displayed on top. Value annotations are always displayed above
Range-based ones. It's also possible to customize the marker display order, by
using the `priority` property. The higher the value of the `priority` property,
the higher precedence the marker has. The `priority` property also affects the
color of markers i.e. within a group, the color of the marker with the highest
priority will be applied to the group.

It's possible to assign a label to a track using the data obtained through
`labelAccessor` property. Be aware that labels are hidden by default. To show a
track's label, the `showLabels` property has to be applied to the
`XYChart.Annotations` component.

##### Visibility

An entire track can be hidden by adding the `hidden` property to the
`XYChartAnnotations.Track` component. The same configuration can be applied to a
marker, by setting the `hidden` property on the `XYChartAnnotations.Marker`
component.

When hovering a marker (with the cursor), an annotation indicator appears over
the chart area. The indicator's visibility can be customized on either a track
or marker level by using the `indicatorsDisplay` property:

- With the `auto` option, the default behaviour is applied - indicators appear
on hover.

- The `always` option sets indicators to always be visible within the chart
area, regardless of the hovering behavior.

- The `never` option sets indicators to never be visible.

##### Custom tooltip

The Annotations supports both default and custom tooltips for annotations. This
allows creators to provide additional detailed information about specific
datapoints or events in the chart.

See Annotations Tooltip
for more

```tsx
import { ChartTooltip, XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 'Info',
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 'Error',
  },
];

const dotPositiveNegative = [
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 5 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 15 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 25 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 35 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -15, y: 5 },
];

const positiveData = [
  { x: -30, y: 0, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -20, y: 30, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -10, y: 50, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 0, y: -20, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 10, y: 78.123, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 20, y: 67.891, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 30, y: 12.345, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 40, y: 34.567, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 50, y: 56.789, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
];

const numericalFirstSeries = [
  {
    qty: 30,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 20 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
  {
    qty: 80,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 30, maxRevenue: 40 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
];

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.Tooltip>
        {(payload) => {
          // Custom tooltip for DotSeries
          if (payload.dotPayload) {
            const textX = payload.dotPayload.xFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.x0) as number & Date
            );

            const textY = payload.dotPayload.yFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.y0) as number & Date
            );

            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesHeader
                  seriesLabel={payload.dotPayload.xAxisLabel ?? ''}
                  valueLabel={payload.dotPayload.yAxisLabel ?? ''}
                />
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.dotPayload.color}
                  name={textX}
                  value={textY}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          if (payload.barPayload) {
            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.barPayload.color}
                  name={`Bar series name: ${payload.barPayload.seriesName}`}
                  value={String(payload.barPayload.datapoint.y1)}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          // No tooltip for RectSeries (returns null)
          if (payload.rectPayload) {
            return null;
          }

          // Fallback to default tooltip for LineSeries (returns undefined)
          // This happens implicitly when no return statement is reached
        }}
      </XYChart.Tooltip>

      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        colorPalette="purple-rain"
        valueAccessor="value"
        data={numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical}
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        data={dotPositiveNegative}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="y"
        y0Accessor="x"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        shape="triangle"
        color="Salmon"
      />
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={positiveData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x"
        y0Accessor="y"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.BarSeries
        data={numericalFirstSeries}
        variant="stack"
        x0Accessor="d.minRevenue"
        x1Accessor="d.maxRevenue"
        y1Accessor="qty"
        seriesIdAccessor="d.host"
        nameAccessor="d.host"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { ChartTooltip, XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 'Info',
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 'Error',
  },
];

const dotPositiveNegative = [
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 5 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 15 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 25 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 35 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -15, y: 5 },
];

const positiveData = [
  { x: -30, y: 0, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -20, y: 30, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -10, y: 50, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 0, y: -20, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 10, y: 78.123, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 20, y: 67.891, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 30, y: 12.345, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 40, y: 34.567, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 50, y: 56.789, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
];

const numericalFirstSeries = [
  {
    qty: 30,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 20 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
  {
    qty: 80,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 30, maxRevenue: 40 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
];

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.Tooltip>
        {(payload) => {
          // Custom tooltip for DotSeries
          if (payload.dotPayload) {
            const textX = payload.dotPayload.xFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.x0) as number & Date
            );

            const textY = payload.dotPayload.yFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.y0) as number & Date
            );

            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesHeader
                  seriesLabel={payload.dotPayload.xAxisLabel ?? ''}
                  valueLabel={payload.dotPayload.yAxisLabel ?? ''}
                />
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.dotPayload.color}
                  name={textX}
                  value={textY}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          if (payload.barPayload) {
            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.barPayload.color}
                  name={`Bar series name: ${payload.barPayload.seriesName}`}
                  value={String(payload.barPayload.datapoint.y1)}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          // No tooltip for RectSeries (returns null)
          if (payload.rectPayload) {
            return null;
          }

          // Fallback to default tooltip for LineSeries (returns undefined)
          // This happens implicitly when no return statement is reached
        }}
      </XYChart.Tooltip>

      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        colorPalette="purple-rain"
        valueAccessor="value"
        data={numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical}
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        data={dotPositiveNegative}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="y"
        y0Accessor="x"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        shape="triangle"
        color="Salmon"
      />
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={positiveData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x"
        y0Accessor="y"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.BarSeries
        data={numericalFirstSeries}
        variant="stack"
        x0Accessor="d.minRevenue"
        x1Accessor="d.maxRevenue"
        y1Accessor="qty"
        seriesIdAccessor="d.host"
        nameAccessor="d.host"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Thresholds

Thresholds are used to mark meaningful ranges or values, and they can add
contextual information to axes of type numerical (log and linear) and time.

Thresholds may represent either a single point or a range, and can be defined as
static or dynamic. In order to link the threshold to a specific axis, a valid
`yAxisId` property must be set, as well as an additional `xAxisId` property if
the threshold is of type dynamic.

Customization of thresholds is possible through additional properties such as
`color`, `label` and `strokeOnly` (only for ranges). The `label` property can be
used to display a label for the threshold, which will be shown in the tooltip
when hovering over the threshold. The `color` property allows you to set a
custom color for the threshold line, while the `strokeOnly` property will modify
the display of the range threshold to show only the stroke without filling the
area.

##### Point and Range

Both point and range thresholds can be represented by static or dynamic data
sources. A static data source has a single value representing a point or a
single key-value pair representing a fixed range. A dynamic data source has a
data array containing more than one value or various key-value pairs.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const numericalDataset = [
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 238, y: 8 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 151, y: 5 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 237, y: 6 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 245, y: 5 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 274, y: 2 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 147, y: 9 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 199, y: 1 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 140, y: 1 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 2, y: 6 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 27, y: 5 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 255, y: 0 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 80, y: 3 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 33, y: 1 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 188, y: 11 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 138, y: 4 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 66, y: 11 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 19, y: 10 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 190, y: 7 },
  { seriesName: 'series with thresholds', x: 148, y: 0 },
];

const ThresholdsPointAndRange = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={numericalDataset}>
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x"
        y0Accessor="y"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis
        id="y-first-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="left"
        reversed
      />
      <XYChart.ThresholdIndicator
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        data={{ y: 2 }}
        color="blue"
        label="Point threshold"
      />
      <XYChart.ThresholdIndicator
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        data={{ yMin: 8, yMax: 11 }}
        color="green"
        label="Range threshold"
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
    x1: new Date('2023-06-12'),
    y0: new Date('2023-01-12'),
    y1: new Date('2023-02-20'),
  },
  {
    seriesName: 'bottom-right series',
    x0: new Date('2023-02-10'),
    x1: new Date('2023-06-17'),
    y0: new Date('2023-01-10'),
    y1: new Date('2023-02-15'),
  },
];

const ThresholdsDynamic = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={timeframeAndTimeframe}>
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        x1Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        y1Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        color="red"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="time" position="right" />
      <XYChart.ThresholdIndicator
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        data={[
          {
            x: new Date('2023-01-08'),
            yMin: new Date('2023-01-10'),
            yMax: new Date('2023-01-18'),
          },
          {
            x: new Date('2023-01-21'),
            yMin: new Date('2023-02-18'),
            yMax: new Date('2023-03-05'),
          },
          {
            x: new Date('2023-02-28'),
            yMin: new Date('2023-03-05'),
            yMax: new Date('2023-01-10'),
          },
          {
            x: new Date('2023-04-01'),
            yMin: new Date('2023-01-10'),
            yMax: new Date('2023-02-10'),
          },
        ]}
        color="#FFAA33"
        label="Dynamic range threshold"
        strokeOnly
      />
      <XYChart.ThresholdIndicator
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        data={[
          { x: new Date('2023-01-08'), y: new Date('2023-01-18') },
          { x: new Date('2023-01-21'), y: new Date('2023-02-18') },
          { x: new Date('2023-02-28'), y: new Date('2023-03-18') },
          { x: new Date('2023-04-01'), y: new Date('2023-04-18') },
        ]}
        color="blue"
        label="Dynamic point threshold"
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

#### Shared Crosshair

The shared crosshair feature allows you to synchronize the crosshair position
across multiple `XYChart` or `Timeseries` instances. This is especially useful
for comparing time-based data points across different charts.

To enable crosshair synchronization, wrap the charts you want to synchronize
with the `SynchronizationProvider` component.

Important notes for XYChart:

- x-axis Only: The shared crosshair synchronization only works for the X
axis. y-axis are not supported.

- Supported Axis: The shared crosshair will only synchronize on visible
time axes. Numerical or categorical axes are not supported for crosshair
synchronization.

- Axis Priority: If both a bottom and a top time axis are present and
visible, the bottom axis takes priority for synchronization.

- Hidden Axes: Axes marked as `hidden` will not trigger or participate in
crosshair synchronization, even if they are of type `time`.

```tsx

  SharedChartInteractions,
  type Timeseries,
  TimeseriesChart,
  XYChart,

import { Surface } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/layouts';

        style={{
          display: 'grid',
          gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr 1fr',
          gap: '1em',
        }}

              x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
              x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
              y0Accessor="vertical.start"
              y1Accessor="vertical.end"
              valueAccessor="value"

            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <XYChart data={timestampXandNumericalYValueNumerical} height="300px">

              xAxisId="x-first-axis"

              x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
              x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
              y0Accessor="vertical.start"
              y1Accessor="vertical.end"
              valueAccessor="value"
            />

              id="x-first-axis"
              type="time"
              reversed
              position="bottom"
            />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <XYChart data={timestampXandNumericalYValueNumerical} height="300px">
            <XYChart.RectSeries
              xAxisId="x-first-axis"
              yAxisId="y-first-axis"
              x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
              x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
              y0Accessor="vertical.start"
              y1Accessor="vertical.end"
              valueAccessor="value"
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="time" position="top" />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <TimeseriesChart
            data={mockTimeseriesDiskUsage.map((t) => {
              return {
                ...t,
                datapoints: t.datapoints.slice(9),
              };
            })}
            variant="area"
          />
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <TimeseriesChart
            data={mockTimeseriesDiskUsage.map((t) => {
              return {
                ...t,
                datapoints: t.datapoints.slice(12),
              };
            })}
            variant="area"
          />
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <TimeseriesChart
            data={mockTimeseriesDiskUsage.map((t) => {
              return {
                ...t,
                datapoints: t.datapoints.slice(5),
              };
            })}
            variant="area"
          />
        </Surface>
      </div>
    </SharedChartInteractions>
  );
};
```

```tsx
      start: '2022-04-05T12:33:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:34:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 150, end: 200 },
    value: 4500,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:34:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:35:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    value: 6500,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:35:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:36:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    value: 2000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:36:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:37:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    value: 0,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:37:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:38:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 50, end: 100 },
    value: 3500,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:38:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:39:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 100, end: 150 },
    value: 3500,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:39:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:40:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 150, end: 200 },
    value: 4500,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:40:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:41:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    value: 3000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:41:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:42:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    value: 2000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: '2022-04-05T12:42:00Z',
      end: '2022-04-05T12:43:00Z',
    },
    vertical: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    value: 5500,
  },
];

const SharedCrosshair = () => {
  return (
    <SharedChartInteractions>
      <div
        style={{
          display: 'grid',
          gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr 1fr',
          gap: '1em',
        }}
      >
        <Surface>
          <XYChart data={timestampXandNumericalYValueNumerical} height="300px">
            <XYChart.RectSeries
              xAxisId="x-first-axis"
              yAxisId="y-first-axis"
              x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
              x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
              y0Accessor="vertical.start"
              y1Accessor="vertical.end"
              valueAccessor="value"
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <XYChart data={timestampXandNumericalYValueNumerical} height="300px">
            <XYChart.RectSeries
              xAxisId="x-first-axis"
              yAxisId="y-first-axis"
              x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
              x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
              y0Accessor="vertical.start"
              y1Accessor="vertical.end"
              valueAccessor="value"
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis
              id="x-first-axis"
              type="time"
              reversed
              position="bottom"
            />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <XYChart data={timestampXandNumericalYValueNumerical} height="300px">
            <XYChart.RectSeries
              xAxisId="x-first-axis"
              yAxisId="y-first-axis"
              x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
              x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
              y0Accessor="vertical.start"
              y1Accessor="vertical.end"
              valueAccessor="value"
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="time" position="top" />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <TimeseriesChart
            data={mockTimeseriesDiskUsage.map((t) => {
              return {
                ...t,
                datapoints: t.datapoints.slice(9),
              };
            })}
            variant="area"
          />
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <TimeseriesChart
            data={mockTimeseriesDiskUsage.map((t) => {
              return {
                ...t,
                datapoints: t.datapoints.slice(12),
              };
            })}
            variant="area"
          />
        </Surface>
        <Surface>
          <TimeseriesChart
            data={mockTimeseriesDiskUsage.map((t) => {
              return {
                ...t,
                datapoints: t.datapoints.slice(5),
              };
            })}
            variant="area"
          />
        </Surface>
      </div>
    </SharedChartInteractions>
  );
};
```


#### Custom Tooltip

The XYChart component supports custom tooltips via the `XYChart.Tooltip`
subcomponent. This allows you to fully control the content and layout of
tooltips for different series types.

Wrap your custom rendering logic in `XYChart.Tooltip` and use the provided
payload to determine which series is being hovered. You can return any JSX,
`null` to hide the tooltip for a specific series, or `undefined` to fall back to
the default tooltip. You can also pass `hidden` to `XYChart.Tooltip` to suppress
the tooltip entirely without a render function.

```tsx
import { ChartTooltip, XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 'Info',
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 'Error',
  },
];

const dotPositiveNegative = [
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 5 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 15 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 25 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 35 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -15, y: 5 },
];

const positiveData = [
  { x: -30, y: 0, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -20, y: 30, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -10, y: 50, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 0, y: -20, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 10, y: 78.123, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 20, y: 67.891, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 30, y: 12.345, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 40, y: 34.567, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 50, y: 56.789, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
];

const numericalFirstSeries = [
  {
    qty: 30,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 20 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
  {
    qty: 80,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 30, maxRevenue: 40 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
];

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.Tooltip>
        {(payload) => {
          // Custom tooltip for DotSeries
          if (payload.dotPayload) {
            const textX = payload.dotPayload.xFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.x0) as number & Date
            );

            const textY = payload.dotPayload.yFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.y0) as number & Date
            );

            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesHeader
                  seriesLabel={payload.dotPayload.xAxisLabel ?? ''}
                  valueLabel={payload.dotPayload.yAxisLabel ?? ''}
                />
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.dotPayload.color}
                  name={textX}
                  value={textY}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          if (payload.barPayload) {
            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.barPayload.color}
                  name={`Bar series name: ${payload.barPayload.seriesName}`}
                  value={String(payload.barPayload.datapoint.y1)}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          // No tooltip for RectSeries (returns null)
          if (payload.rectPayload) {
            return null;
          }

          // Fallback to default tooltip for LineSeries (returns undefined)
          // This happens implicitly when no return statement is reached
        }}
      </XYChart.Tooltip>

      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        colorPalette="purple-rain"
        valueAccessor="value"
        data={numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical}
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        data={dotPositiveNegative}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="y"
        y0Accessor="x"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        shape="triangle"
        color="Salmon"
      />
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={positiveData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x"
        y0Accessor="y"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.BarSeries
        data={numericalFirstSeries}
        variant="stack"
        x0Accessor="d.minRevenue"
        x1Accessor="d.maxRevenue"
        y1Accessor="qty"
        seriesIdAccessor="d.host"
        nameAccessor="d.host"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { ChartTooltip, XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    value: 'Info',
  },
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 10,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 20,
    },
    value: 'Error',
  },
];

const dotPositiveNegative = [
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 5 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 15 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 25 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -5, y: 35 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: -15, y: 5 },
];

const positiveData = [
  { x: -30, y: 0, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -20, y: 30, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: -10, y: 50, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 0, y: -20, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 10, y: 78.123, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 20, y: 67.891, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 30, y: 12.345, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 40, y: 34.567, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
  { x: 50, y: 56.789, seriesId: '1', name: 'line-series-positive-data' },
];

const numericalFirstSeries = [
  {
    qty: 30,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 20 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
  {
    qty: 80,
    d: { host: 'series 1', minRevenue: 30, maxRevenue: 40 },
    priority: 'high',
  },
];

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]}>
      <XYChart.Tooltip>
        {(payload) => {
          // Custom tooltip for DotSeries
          if (payload.dotPayload) {
            const textX = payload.dotPayload.xFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.x0) as number & Date
            );

            const textY = payload.dotPayload.yFormatter(
              Number(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.y0) as number & Date
            );

            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesHeader
                  seriesLabel={payload.dotPayload.xAxisLabel ?? ''}
                  valueLabel={payload.dotPayload.yAxisLabel ?? ''}
                />
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.dotPayload.color}
                  name={textX}
                  value={textY}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          if (payload.barPayload) {
            return (
              <div role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.barPayload.color}
                  name={`Bar series name: ${payload.barPayload.seriesName}`}
                  value={String(payload.barPayload.datapoint.y1)}
                />
              </div>
            );
          }

          // No tooltip for RectSeries (returns null)
          if (payload.rectPayload) {
            return null;
          }

          // Fallback to default tooltip for LineSeries (returns undefined)
          // This happens implicitly when no return statement is reached
        }}
      </XYChart.Tooltip>

      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        colorPalette="purple-rain"
        valueAccessor="value"
        data={numericalXnumericalYValueCategorical}
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        data={dotPositiveNegative}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="y"
        y0Accessor="x"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        shape="triangle"
        color="Salmon"
      />
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={positiveData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x"
        y0Accessor="y"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.BarSeries
        data={numericalFirstSeries}
        variant="stack"
        x0Accessor="d.minRevenue"
        x1Accessor="d.maxRevenue"
        y1Accessor="qty"
        seriesIdAccessor="d.host"
        nameAccessor="d.host"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="both" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Value representation

By default, values within a chart are displayed as is - with their absolute
value (e.g. 3.14 kB). However, for numerical axes this can be changed so that
instead of absolute values, relative values are used. The property
`valueRepresentation` can be set to `relative` in a numerical axis to show all
data related to that axis as relative.

CodeSandbox Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community

- Loading state

- Toolbar

- Styling
- Annotations

- Shared Crosshair
- Custom Tooltip
- Value representation

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { Flex } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/layouts';
import { units } from '@dynatrace-sdk/units';

const dotData = [
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 120, y: 10 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 250, y: -18 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 380, y: 32 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 475, y: -12 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 590, y: 28 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 680, y: -5 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 820, y: 42 },
  { seriesName: 'series 1', x: 950, y: 15 },
];

const ValueRepresentation = () => {
  return (
    <Flex flexWrap="wrap">
      <Flex flexItem width="48%">
        <h5>Absolute Value Representation</h5>
        <XYChart data={[]} height="200px">
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            data={dotData}
            xAxisId="x-axis"
            yAxisId="y-axis"
            x0Accessor="x"
            y0Accessor="y"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis
            id="x-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="bottom"
            valueRepresentation="absolute"
            formatter={{
              input: units.length.meter,
              output: units.length.meter,
            }}
          />
          <XYChart.YAxis
            id="y-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="left"
            valueRepresentation="absolute"
            formatter={{
              input: units.data.byte,
              output: units.data.kilobyte,
            }}
          />
        </XYChart>
      </Flex>
      <Flex flexItem width="48%">
        <h5>Relative Value Representation</h5>
        <XYChart data={[]} height="200px">
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            data={dotData}
            xAxisId="x-axis"
            yAxisId="y-axis"
            x0Accessor="x"
            y0Accessor="y"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis
            id="x-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="bottom"
            valueRepresentation="relative"
            formatter={{
              input: units.length.meter,
              output: units.length.meter,
            }}
          />
          <XYChart.YAxis
            id="y-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="left"
            valueRepresentation="relative"
            formatter={{
              input: units.data.byte,
              output: units.data.kilobyte,
            }}
          />
        </XYChart>
      </Flex>
    </Flex>
  );
};
```

```tsx
const ValueRepresentation = () => {

          <XYChart.YAxis

      </Flex>
```
