#### Color Rules

`ColorRules` are advanced coloring tools for the chart, allowing you to apply
conditional coloring based on data values. See more details in the
XYChart docs.

#### Series actions

A series action is a creator, defined interaction with a given data point in the
chart. Basic interactions include copying a series name and inspecting the
underlying data of a data point. Series actions support both synchronous and
asynchronous callbacks. In order to enable chart interactions, the
`ChartSeriesAction` subcomponent needs to be appended within the `XYChart`. More
subcomponents can be added within this component, for instance
`ChartSeriesAction.Item`, where you can provide a custom action that will appear
in the legend menu. That action can execute any custom logic in its `onSelect`
callback or get disabled via a `disabled` prop. `Intents` could be added as part
of the series action as well with `ChartSeriesAction.Intent`.

If the datapoint belongs to a stack or group that belongs to a categorical
primary axis, the datapoint together with the other datapoints in the same stack
or group will be returned to be used in the action.

```tsx
import {
  useMemo,
  useState,
  type Dispatch,
  type ReactElement,
  type SetStateAction,
} from 'react';

import {
  XYChart,
  ChartSeriesAction,
  type SeriesActionsTemplate,
  type BarDatapoint,
  type XYChartBarSeriesActionItem,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { SimpleTable } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/tables';
import { DatabaseIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const data: BarDatapoint[] = [
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 12, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 26, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 38, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 52, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
];

const stackCatXnum = [
  {
    category: 'Q1',
    d: { host: 'AA', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 110 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q1',
    d: { host: 'CC', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 50 },
    name: 'marketing',
    seriesId: 'marketing',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q2',
    d: { host: 'BB', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 130 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q3',
    d: { host: 'AA', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 120 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q3',
    d: { host: 'CC', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 60 },
    name: 'marketing',
    seriesId: 'marketing',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q3',
    d: { host: 'BB', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 50 },
    name: 'law',
    seriesId: 'law',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q4',
    d: { host: 'DD', minRevenue: 80, maxRevenue: 150 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
];

const stackTime = [
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-01'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-05'),
    },
    seriesId: 'First Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-03'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-05'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Second Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-04'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-06'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Third Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'marketing',
      start: new Date('2023-01-07'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-10'),
    },
    seriesId: 'First Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'law',
      start: new Date('2023-01-03'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-06'),
    },
    seriesId: 'First Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'law',
      start: new Date('2023-01-01'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-05'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Third Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'law',
      start: new Date('2023-01-05'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-09'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Forth Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'marketing',
      start: new Date('2023-01-09'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-13'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Second Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-06'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-11'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Forth Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'marketing',
      start: new Date('2023-01-10'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-13'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Third Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-08'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-09'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Fifth Employee',
  },
];

const chartSeriesAction = (
  action: XYChartBarSeriesActionItem,
  setter: Dispatch<SetStateAction<XYChartBarSeriesActionItem | undefined>>,
  isAsync = false
): ReactElement => {
  return (
    <ChartSeriesAction>
      <ChartSeriesAction.Item onSelect={() => setter(action)}>
        <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
          <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
        </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
        Inspect data point {isAsync ? '(async)' : ''}
      </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
      <ChartSeriesAction.Item disabled onSelect={() => void 0}>
        <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
          <DatabaseIcon />
        </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
        A disabled action
      </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
    </ChartSeriesAction>
  );
};

const handleSeriesActions = (
  datapoint: XYChartBarSeriesActionItem,
  setter: Dispatch<SetStateAction<XYChartBarSeriesActionItem | undefined>>,
  isAsync: boolean
): SeriesActionsTemplate => {
  if (isAsync) {
    // Return Promise<ReactElement>, not Promise<SeriesActionsTemplate>
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        resolve(chartSeriesAction(datapoint, setter, true));
      }, 500);
    });
  }
  return chartSeriesAction(datapoint, setter);
};

const SeriesActions = () => {
  const [selectedCell, setSelectedCell] =
    useState<XYChartBarSeriesActionItem>();

  const columns = [
    { id: 'key', header: 'Key', accessor: 'key' },
    { id: 'value', header: 'Value', accessor: 'value' },
  ];

  const tableData = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedCell) {
      // If there are grouped datapoints, create a table for each one
      if (
        'datapoints' in selectedCell &&
        Array.isArray(selectedCell.datapoints)
      ) {
        return selectedCell.datapoints.map((datapoint) => {
          const { x0, x1, y0, y1, ...rest } = datapoint;
          return [
            { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
            { key: 'x1', value: x1 },
            { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
            { key: 'y1', value: y1 },
            { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
          ];
        });
      }

      // Single datapoint case
      const { x0, x1, y0, y1, name, ...rest } = selectedCell.datapoint;
      const singleDatapointTable = [
        { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
        { key: 'x1', value: x1 },
        { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
        { key: 'y1', value: y1 },
        { key: 'name ', value: name },
        { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
      ];

      return [singleDatapointTable];
    }
    return [];
  }, [selectedCell]);

  return (
    <>
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '20px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>
        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <XYChart data={[{}]} colorPalette="categorical">
            <XYChart.BarSeries
              data={data}
              variant="single"
              xAxisId="x-axis"
              yAxisId="y-axis"
              x0Accessor="x0"
              y1Accessor="y1"
              nameAccessor="name"
              seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
              actions={(datapoint) =>
                handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, false)
              }
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="categorical" position="bottom" />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </div>

        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <XYChart data={stackCatXnum}>
            <XYChart.BarSeries
              variant="stack"
              x0Accessor="category"
              y1Accessor="d.maxRevenue"
              seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
              nameAccessor="name"
              yAxisId="y-axis"
              xAxisId="x-axis"
              actions={(datapoint) =>
                handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, false)
              }
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="categorical" position="bottom" />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </div>

        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <XYChart data={stackTime} colorPalette="fireplace">
            <XYChart.BarSeries
              variant="group"
              x0Accessor="d.host"
              y0Accessor="d.start"
              y1Accessor="d.end"
              seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
              nameAccessor="seriesId"
              xAxisId="group-categorical-x"
              yAxisId="group-time-y"
              actions={(datapoint) =>
                handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, false)
              }
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis
              id="group-categorical-x"
              type="categorical"
              position="bottom"
            />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="group-time-y" type="time" position="left" />
            <XYChart.YAxis
              id="group-numerical-y"
              type="numerical"
              position="right"
            />
            <XYChart.Legend hidden />
          </XYChart>
        </div>
      </div>

      {selectedCell && (
        <div>
          <h4>Selected Series</h4>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '20px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>
            {Array.isArray(tableData) &&
              tableData.map((td, index) => (
                <div key={index} style={{ marginBottom: '20px' }}>
                  <h5>Datapoint {index + 1}</h5>
                  <SimpleTable columns={columns} data={td} />
                </div>
              ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import {
  useMemo,
  useState,
  type Dispatch,
  type ReactElement,
  type SetStateAction,
} from 'react';

import {
  XYChart,
  ChartSeriesAction,
  type SeriesActionsTemplate,
  type BarDatapoint,
  type XYChartBarSeriesActionItem,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { SimpleTable } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/tables';
import { DatabaseIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const data: BarDatapoint[] = [
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 12, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 26, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 38, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 52, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
];

const stackCatXnum = [
  {
    category: 'Q1',
    d: { host: 'AA', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 110 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q1',
    d: { host: 'CC', minRevenue: 10, maxRevenue: 50 },
    name: 'marketing',
    seriesId: 'marketing',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q2',
    d: { host: 'BB', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 130 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q3',
    d: { host: 'AA', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 120 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q3',
    d: { host: 'CC', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 60 },
    name: 'marketing',
    seriesId: 'marketing',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q3',
    d: { host: 'BB', minRevenue: 50, maxRevenue: 50 },
    name: 'law',
    seriesId: 'law',
  },
  {
    category: 'Q4',
    d: { host: 'DD', minRevenue: 80, maxRevenue: 150 },
    name: 'sales',
    seriesId: 'sales-1',
  },
];

const stackTime = [
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-01'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-05'),
    },
    seriesId: 'First Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-03'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-05'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Second Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-04'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-06'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Third Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'marketing',
      start: new Date('2023-01-07'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-10'),
    },
    seriesId: 'First Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'law',
      start: new Date('2023-01-03'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-06'),
    },
    seriesId: 'First Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'law',
      start: new Date('2023-01-01'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-05'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Third Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'law',
      start: new Date('2023-01-05'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-09'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Forth Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'marketing',
      start: new Date('2023-01-09'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-13'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Second Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-06'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-11'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Forth Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'marketing',
      start: new Date('2023-01-10'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-13'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Third Employee',
  },
  {
    d: {
      host: 'sales',
      start: new Date('2023-01-08'),
      end: new Date('2023-01-09'),
    },
    seriesId: 'Fifth Employee',
  },
];

const chartSeriesAction = (
  action: XYChartBarSeriesActionItem,
  setter: Dispatch<SetStateAction<XYChartBarSeriesActionItem | undefined>>,
  isAsync = false
): ReactElement => {
  return (
    <ChartSeriesAction>
      <ChartSeriesAction.Item onSelect={() => setter(action)}>
        <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
          <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
        </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
        Inspect data point {isAsync ? '(async)' : ''}
      </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
      <ChartSeriesAction.Item disabled onSelect={() => void 0}>
        <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
          <DatabaseIcon />
        </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
        A disabled action
      </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
    </ChartSeriesAction>
  );
};

const handleSeriesActions = (
  datapoint: XYChartBarSeriesActionItem,
  setter: Dispatch<SetStateAction<XYChartBarSeriesActionItem | undefined>>,
  isAsync: boolean
): SeriesActionsTemplate => {
  if (isAsync) {
    // Return Promise<ReactElement>, not Promise<SeriesActionsTemplate>
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        resolve(chartSeriesAction(datapoint, setter, true));
      }, 500);
    });
  }
  return chartSeriesAction(datapoint, setter);
};

const SeriesActions = () => {
  const [selectedCell, setSelectedCell] =
    useState<XYChartBarSeriesActionItem>();

  const columns = [
    { id: 'key', header: 'Key', accessor: 'key' },
    { id: 'value', header: 'Value', accessor: 'value' },
  ];

  const tableData = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedCell) {
      // If there are grouped datapoints, create a table for each one
      if (
        'datapoints' in selectedCell &&
        Array.isArray(selectedCell.datapoints)
      ) {
        return selectedCell.datapoints.map((datapoint) => {
          const { x0, x1, y0, y1, ...rest } = datapoint;
          return [
            { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
            { key: 'x1', value: x1 },
            { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
            { key: 'y1', value: y1 },
            { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
          ];
        });
      }

      // Single datapoint case
      const { x0, x1, y0, y1, name, ...rest } = selectedCell.datapoint;
      const singleDatapointTable = [
        { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
        { key: 'x1', value: x1 },
        { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
        { key: 'y1', value: y1 },
        { key: 'name ', value: name },
        { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
      ];

      return [singleDatapointTable];
    }
    return [];
  }, [selectedCell]);

  return (
    <>
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '20px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>
        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <XYChart data={[{}]} colorPalette="categorical">
            <XYChart.BarSeries
              data={data}
              variant="single"
              xAxisId="x-axis"
              yAxisId="y-axis"
              x0Accessor="x0"
              y1Accessor="y1"
              nameAccessor="name"
              seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
              actions={(datapoint) =>
                handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, false)
              }
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="categorical" position="bottom" />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </div>

        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <XYChart data={stackCatXnum}>
            <XYChart.BarSeries
              variant="stack"
              x0Accessor="category"
              y1Accessor="d.maxRevenue"
              seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
              nameAccessor="name"
              yAxisId="y-axis"
              xAxisId="x-axis"
              actions={(datapoint) =>
                handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, false)
              }
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="categorical" position="bottom" />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
          </XYChart>
        </div>

        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <XYChart data={stackTime} colorPalette="fireplace">
            <XYChart.BarSeries
              variant="group"
              x0Accessor="d.host"
              y0Accessor="d.start"
              y1Accessor="d.end"
              seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
              nameAccessor="seriesId"
              xAxisId="group-categorical-x"
              yAxisId="group-time-y"
              actions={(datapoint) =>
                handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, false)
              }
            />
            <XYChart.XAxis
              id="group-categorical-x"
              type="categorical"
              position="bottom"
            />
            <XYChart.YAxis id="group-time-y" type="time" position="left" />
            <XYChart.YAxis
              id="group-numerical-y"
              type="numerical"
              position="right"
            />
            <XYChart.Legend hidden />
          </XYChart>
        </div>
      </div>

      {selectedCell && (
        <div>
          <h4>Selected Series</h4>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '20px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>
            {Array.isArray(tableData) &&
              tableData.map((td, index) => (
                <div key={index} style={{ marginBottom: '20px' }}>
                  <h5>Datapoint {index + 1}</h5>
                  <SimpleTable columns={columns} data={td} />
                </div>
              ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
};
```


#### Custom Tooltip

The XYChart component supports custom tooltips via the XYChart.CustomTooltip
subcomponent. This allows you to fully control the content and layout of
tooltips for different series types.

Wrap your custom rendering logic in XYChart.CustomTooltip and use the provided
payload to determine which series is being hovered. You can return any JSX, or
null to hide the tooltip for a specific series. If you return undefined, the
default tooltip will be used.

```tsx
import {
  type BarDatapoint,
  XYChart,
  type XYChartTooltipPayload,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const data: BarDatapoint[] = [
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 12, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 18, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 8, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 26, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 14, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 22, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 38, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 10, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 16, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 52, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 9, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 31, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
];

const customTooltip = (payload: XYChartTooltipPayload) => {
  if (payload.barPayload) {
    const { seriesName, color } = payload.barPayload;
    const { x0, y1 } = payload.barPayload.datapoint;
    const maxValue = 52;
    const percentage = (y1 as number) / maxValue;
    const greenIntensity = 220 - Math.round(55 * percentage);
    const blueIntensity = 150 - Math.round(150 * percentage);
    const orangeColor = `rgb(255, ${greenIntensity}, ${blueIntensity})`;

    return (
      <section style={{ padding: '8px 0', display: 'flex', gap: '12px' }}>
        <section style={{ flex: 1 }}>
          <p
            style={{
              paddingLeft: '12px',
              paddingRight: '12px',
              paddingBottom: '8px',
            }}
          >
            {String(x0)}
          </p>
          <p
            style={{
              borderTop: '1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)',
              paddingLeft: '12px',
              paddingRight: '12px',
              paddingTop: '8px',
              paddingBottom: '8px',
              backgroundColor: color,
              color: 'white',
              borderRadius: '4px',
            }}
          >
            {seriesName}
          </p>
          <section
            style={{
              borderTop: '1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)',
              paddingLeft: '12px',
              paddingRight: '12px',
              paddingTop: '8px',
            }}
          >
            <p
              style={{
                height: '24px',
                backgroundColor: orangeColor,
                borderRadius: '4px',
                marginBottom: '8px',
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                color: 'white',
                fontWeight: 'bold',
              }}
            >
              {String(y1)}
            </p>
          </section>
        </section>
        <section
          style={{
            display: 'flex',
            flexDirection: 'column',
            alignItems: 'center',
            paddingRight: '12px',
            paddingLeft: '0',
          }}
        >
          <p
            style={{
              fontSize: '11px',
              color: '#666',
              marginBottom: '4px',
            }}
          >
            52
          </p>
          <div
            style={{
              width: '20px',
              height: '80px',
              background:
                'linear-gradient(to bottom, rgb(255, 165, 0), rgb(255, 220, 150))',
              borderRadius: '4px',
              marginBottom: '4px',
            }}
          ></div>
          <p style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: '#666' }}>0</p>
        </section>
      </section>
    );
  }
  return null;
};

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={data} colorPalette="purple-rain">
      <XYChart.Tooltip>{customTooltip}</XYChart.Tooltip>
      <XYChart.BarSeries
        data={data}
        variant="stack"
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y1Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="categorical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import {
  type BarDatapoint,
  XYChart,
  type XYChartTooltipPayload,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const data: BarDatapoint[] = [
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 12, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 18, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Alpha', y1: 8, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 26, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 14, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Beta', y1: 22, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 38, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 10, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Gamma', y1: 16, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 52, seriesId: 'Warning', name: 'Warning' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 9, seriesId: 'Critical', name: 'Critical' },
  { x0: 'Delta', y1: 31, seriesId: 'Info', name: 'Info' },
];

const customTooltip = (payload: XYChartTooltipPayload) => {
  if (payload.barPayload) {
    const { seriesName, color } = payload.barPayload;
    const { x0, y1 } = payload.barPayload.datapoint;
    const maxValue = 52;
    const percentage = (y1 as number) / maxValue;
    const greenIntensity = 220 - Math.round(55 * percentage);
    const blueIntensity = 150 - Math.round(150 * percentage);
    const orangeColor = `rgb(255, ${greenIntensity}, ${blueIntensity})`;

      <section style={{ padding: '8px 0', display: 'flex', gap: '12px' }}>

              paddingTop: '8px',

                justifyContent: 'center',
                color: 'white',
                fontWeight: 'bold',
              }}
            >
              {String(y1)}
            </p>
          </section>
        </section>
        <section
          style={{
            display: 'flex',
            flexDirection: 'column',
            alignItems: 'center',
            paddingRight: '12px',
            paddingLeft: '0',
          }}
        >
          <p
            style={{
              fontSize: '11px',
              color: '#666',
              marginBottom: '4px',
            }}
          >
            52
          </p>
          <div
            style={{
              width: '20px',
              height: '80px',
              background:
                'linear-gradient(to bottom, rgb(255, 165, 0), rgb(255, 220, 150))',
              borderRadius: '4px',
              marginBottom: '4px',
            }}
          ></div>
          <p style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: '#666' }}>0</p>
        </section>
      </section>
    );
  }
  return null;
};

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={data} colorPalette="purple-rain">
      <XYChart.Tooltip>{customTooltip}</XYChart.Tooltip>
      <XYChart.BarSeries
        data={data}
        variant="stack"
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y1Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="categorical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Value representation

Relative values indicate the proportion that a given dimension contributes to
the sum (100%) of a given bar. The `valueRepresentation` prop can be used to
change this behavior.

- For series with only a single dimension, the relative value is based on the
maximum value within the given series.

- For series with stacked bars, each bar will scale relative to itself, meaning
the total height of the stack will be 100%. In case of having positive and
negative values in the same stack, the positive and negative values will be
scaled together, where the 100% will be the highest absolute value amongst the
two positive and negative parts of it. This allows for easy comparison of the
relative contribution of each dimension within the stack, regardless of the
difference amongst absolute values.

- For series with grouped bars, each bar will scale relative to the total
addition of all bars within the same category, allowing for easy comparison of
the relative contribution of each bar within the category regardless of the
difference amongst absolute values. In case of having positive and negative
values in the same category, the positive and negative values will be scaled
together, where the 100% will be the highest absolute addition of bars amongst
the two positive and negative parts of it. This allows for easy comparison of
the relative contribution of each bar within the category, regardless of the
difference amongst absolute values.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { Flex } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/layouts';

const data = [
  { from: 0, to: 10, value: 10, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 10, to: 20, value: 25, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 20, to: 30, value: 50, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 30, to: 40, value: 80, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 40, to: 50, value: 105, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 50, to: 60, value: 120, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 60, to: 70, value: 125, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 70, to: 80, value: 115, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 80, to: 90, value: 90, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 90, to: 100, value: 55, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 100, to: 110, value: 28, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 110, to: 120, value: 12, name: 'Series 1' },
  { from: 120, to: 130, value: 5, name: 'Series 1' },
];

const ValueRepresentationSingleBars = () => {
  return (
    <Flex flexWrap="wrap">
      <Flex flexItem width="48%">
        <h5>Absolute Value Representation</h5>
        <XYChart data={[]} height="200px">
          <XYChart.BarSeries
            data={data}
            variant="single"
            xAxisId="x-axis"
            yAxisId="y-axis"
            x0Accessor="from"
            x1Accessor="to"
            y1Accessor="value"
            nameAccessor="name"
            seriesIdAccessor="name"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis
            id="x-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="bottom"
            valueRepresentation="absolute"
          />
          <XYChart.YAxis
            id="y-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="left"
            valueRepresentation="absolute"
          />
        </XYChart>
      </Flex>
      <Flex flexItem width="48%">
        <h5>Relative Value Representation</h5>
        <XYChart data={[]} height="200px">
          <XYChart.BarSeries
            data={data}
            variant="single"
            xAxisId="x-axis"
            yAxisId="y-axis"
            x0Accessor="from"
            x1Accessor="to"
            y1Accessor="value"
            nameAccessor="name"
            seriesIdAccessor="name"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis
            id="x-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="bottom"
            valueRepresentation="relative"
          />
          <XYChart.YAxis
            id="y-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="left"
            valueRepresentation="relative"
          />
        </XYChart>
      </Flex>
    </Flex>
  );
};
```

### Props

- XYChart-BarSeries
## BarSeries
The BarSeries renders rectangular bars to visualize values across categories,
numbers or time. It supports simple, grouped (clustered), and stacked layouts,
making it ideal for comparisons, totals, and distributions. The BarSeries works
with numeric, time, and categorical axes, and handles a wide range of data
types—perfect for Bar, Column, and Stacked charts.

OverviewProperties

### XYChart.BarSeries

`XYChart.BarSeries` provides a slot for defining a `BarSeries`.

#### XYChartBarSeriesProps

##### Signature:
`export declare type Props = ( | | ) & {
 /**
 * Custom actions to be shown in the tooltip and legend.
 * For tooltip, information about the selected datapoint is displayed.
 * For legend, the first parameter returns the first datapoint of the series and the second parameter returns the series object.
 */
 actions?: (datapoint: , series?: ) => ;
};`Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community
- XYChart.BarSeries

---

## XYChart-DotSeries

`/design/data-visualizations/charts/XYChart-DotSeries/`

## DotSeries
The DotSeries is a type of shape that provides a two-dimensional representation
of data in which pairs of values are shown. This shape turns out great for
representing groups of values spread in classes. It can be an essential
component when creating charts such as Scatter and Dot Plots.

OverviewProperties

### Import

`tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
`

### Use cases

A Dot series visualizes data as individual dots and is used to create charts
like scatter plots, strip plots, opposite diagrams, or dot charts.

##### Scatter plot

```tsx
  return (
```
```tsx
    <XYChart data={stripPlotData} colorPalette="fireplace">
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x2"
        y0Accessor="y2"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="categorical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

##### Opposite diagram

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const oppositeDiagramData = [
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 8.46, y0: -9.44 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 7.71, y0: 6.52 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 3.29, y0: 4.38 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: -6.85, y0: -5.61 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: -8.21, y0: -1.09 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 7.52, y0: -1.8 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 5.39, y0: 6.29 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 6.89, y0: -4 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: -6.34, y0: -8.2 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 4.75, y1: 3.76 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 9.82, y1: -8.84 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -4.96, y1: -3.72 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -9.09, y1: -4.56 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -6.2, y1: -1.9 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 9.96, y1: -5.52 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -0.97, y1: -6.12 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 3.62, y1: 4.47 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -6.32, y1: 9.95 },
];

const DotSeriesOppositeDiagram = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={oppositeDiagramData} colorPalette="categorical">
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-second-axis"
        yAxisId="y-second-axis"
        x0Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis
        id="x-first-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="bottom"
        min={-10}
        max={10}
        label="Bad"
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis
        id="y-first-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="left"
        min={-10}
        max={10}
        label="Complex"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis
        id="x-second-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="top"
        min={-10}
        max={10}
        label="Good"
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis
        id="y-second-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="right"
        min={-10}
        max={10}
        label="Simple"
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const oppositeDiagramData = [
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 8.46, y0: -9.44 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 7.71, y0: 6.52 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 3.29, y0: 4.38 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: -6.85, y0: -5.61 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: -8.21, y0: -1.09 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 7.52, y0: -1.8 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 5.39, y0: 6.29 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: 6.89, y0: -4 },
  { seriesName: 'Current solution', x0: -6.34, y0: -8.2 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 4.75, y1: 3.76 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 9.82, y1: -8.84 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -4.96, y1: -3.72 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -9.09, y1: -4.56 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -6.2, y1: -1.9 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 9.96, y1: -5.52 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -0.97, y1: -6.12 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: 3.62, y1: 4.47 },
  { seriesName: 'Option A', x1: -6.32, y1: 9.95 },

const DotSeriesOppositeDiagram = () => {

      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-second-axis"

        max={10}
        label="Complex"
      />

        id="x-second-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="top"
        min={-10}
        max={10}
        label="Good"
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis
        id="y-second-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="right"
        min={-10}
        max={10}
        label="Simple"
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


### Usage

To display a Dot Series, add the `XYChart.DotSeries` subcomponent within the
`XYChart` component.

This series requires four essential properties that will function as data
accessors and identifier of the series:

- `x0Accessor`: indicates the X value of the data point within the X-domain.

- `y0Accessor`: indicates the Y value of the data point within the Y-domain.

- `name`: indicates the name of the series.

- `seriesIdAccessor`: specifies which data should be used as the unique
identifier for each series. This identifier will be used to group data points
belonging to the same series, allowing multiple series per slot.

- `nameAccessor`: indicates what data should be used as the name of the series.

These accessors support numerical, categorical and time data. When using the
time data, a single accessor is enough for timestamps, but this series also
supports timeframes. If using a timeframe, a second pair of accessors is needed
in order to define the position of the point. In this case the series will
position the data point in the average time of both end points of the timeframe.

- `x1Accessor`: indicates the X end point value for a data point timeframe.

- `y1Accessor`: indicates the Y end point value for a data point timeframe.

It's relevant to comment that these two accessors have no utility when using
non-temporal data.

These accessors will extract the specified data from the provided object array
via the `data` property. It’s crucial to note that the accessors are used to
position the data points in the 2-dimensional space; incorrect specification of
any accessor will result in an inability to generate the DotSeries correctly.

Additionally, a `XYChart.DotSeries` will need to be assigned to at least one
x-axis and one y-axis via valid `xAxisId` and `yAxisId` properties. For a more
detailed explanation of the axis configuration, please refer to the
XYChart docs.

The `XYChart.DotSeries` subcomponent includes some other optional properties:
`data`, `colorPalette`, `color` and `actions`.

The `data`, `colorPalette` and `color` properties can be used to overwrite the
`XYChart` component for a specific series.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { formatDate as dateFormatter } from '@dynatrace-sdk/units';

const stdData = [
  { seriesId: '1', seriesName: 'First Series ', ax: '2022-03-03', ay: 0.2 },
  { seriesId: '1', seriesName: 'First Series ', ax: '2022-07-01', ay: 26.95 },
  { seriesId: '1', seriesName: 'First Series ', ax: '2021-05-28', ay: 24.32 },
  { seriesId: '1', seriesName: 'First Series ', ax: '2021-12-16', ay: 8.54 },
  { seriesId: '1', seriesName: 'First Series ', ax: '2021-12-11', ay: 28.9 },
  { seriesId: '1', seriesName: 'First Series ', ax: '2020-10-10', ay: 22.83 },
  { seriesId: '1', seriesName: 'First Series ', ax: '2021-11-05', ay: 18.86 },

const DotSeriesSimple = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={stdData}>
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="ax"
        y0Accessor="ay"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis
        id="x-axis"
        type="time"
        position="bottom"
        formatter={dateFormatter}
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
const DotSeriesSimple = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={stdData}>
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="ax"
        y0Accessor="ay"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis
        id="x-axis"
        type="time"
        position="bottom"
        formatter={dateFormatter}
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Data

The data provided to the `DotSeries` component via the `data` property will be
used in combination with the accessors of each series.

#### Coloring

By using the `color` and `colorPalette` properties in the `DotSeries` you can
overwrite the coloring from the `XYChart` component. These two properties are
mutually exclusive. For more information about how to use coloring in the chart
you can refer to the XYChart docs.

##### Color

The `color` property allows you to set any desired color as the color of the
dots of a specific series.

```tsx

const DotSeriesColor = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={stdData} colorPalette="red">
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x2"
        y0Accessor="y2"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        color="#35d22a"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x3"
        y0Accessor="y3"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="categorical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 50.89, y3: 'Fish' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 40.38, y3: 'Cat' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 44.39, y3: 'Dog' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 4.12, y3: 'Elephant' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 37.36, y3: 'Cat' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 41.05, y3: 'Dog' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 20.84, y3: 'Elephant' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 50.51, y3: 'Giraffe' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 0.9, y3: 'Lion' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 22.19, y3: 'Dog' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 21.84, y3: 'Dog' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 50.38, y3: 'Elephant' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 25.61, y3: 'Cat' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 14.53, y3: 'Cat' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 30.24, y3: 'Crocodile' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 12.02, y3: 'Crocodile' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 7.44, y3: 'Fish' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 32.46, y3: 'Elephant' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 49.37, y3: 'Lion' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 36.89, y3: 'Elephant' },
  { seriesName: 'Red3 - original palette', x3: 38.48, y3: 'Elephant' },
];

const DotSeriesColor = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={stdData} colorPalette="red">
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y1"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x2"
        y0Accessor="y2"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        color="#35d22a"
      />
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="x3"
        y0Accessor="y3"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="categorical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


##### Color Rules

`ColorRules` are advanced coloring tools for the chart, allowing you to apply
conditional coloring based on data values. See more details in the
XYChart docs.

#### Shapes

The `shape` property on `DotSeries` allows you to display different geometric
shapes for each data point in the series. In addition to the default `circle`,
you can now choose between `square`, `diamond`, and `triangle` shapes.

```tsx

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr',
        gap: '1em',
      }}
    >
      <Surface>
        <XYChart
          data={randomNumber}
          height="300px"
          colorPalette={{
            Error: '#be5d46',
            Info: '#6092c5',
            Warning: '#cdde42',
          }}
        >
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x0"
            y0Accessor="y0"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="diamond"
          />
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x1"
            y0Accessor="y1"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="diamond"
          />
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x2"
            y0Accessor="y2"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="diamond"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis
            id="x-first-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="bottom"
            hidden
          />
          <XYChart.YAxis
            id="y-first-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="left"
            hidden
          />
        </XYChart>
      </Surface>
      <Surface>
        <XYChart
          height="300px"
          data={randomNumber}
          colorPalette={{
            Error: '#be5d46',
            Info: '#6092c5',
            Warning: '#cdde42',
          }}
        >
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x0"
            y0Accessor="y0"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="square"
          />
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x1"
            y0Accessor="y1"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="square"
          />
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x2"
            y0Accessor="y2"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="square"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis
            id="x-first-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="bottom"
            hidden
          />
          <XYChart.YAxis
            id="y-first-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="left"
            hidden
          />
        </XYChart>
      </Surface>
      <Surface>

          colorPalette={{
            Error: '#be5d46',
            Info: '#6092c5',
            Warning: '#cdde42',

        >
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"

            x0Accessor="x0"
            y0Accessor="y0"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="triangle"
          />
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x1"
            y0Accessor="y1"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="triangle"
          />
          <XYChart.DotSeries
            xAxisId="x-first-axis"
            yAxisId="y-first-axis"
            x0Accessor="x2"
            y0Accessor="y2"
            nameAccessor="seriesName"
            shape="triangle"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis
            id="x-first-axis"

            position="bottom"
            hidden
          />
          <XYChart.YAxis
            id="y-first-axis"
            type="numerical"
            position="left"
```

```tsx
        </XYChart>
      </Surface>
    </div>
  );
};
```


#### Series actions

A series action is a creator-defined interaction with a given data point in the
chart. Basic interactions include copying a series name and inspecting the
underlying data of a data point. Series actions support both synchronous and
asynchronous callbacks. In order to enable chart interactions, the
`ChartSeriesAction` subcomponent needs to be appended within the `XYChart`. More
subcomponents can be added within this component, for instance
`ChartSeriesAction.Item`, where you can provide a custom action that will appear
in the legend menu. That action can execute any custom logic in its `onSelect`
callback or get disabled via a `disabled` prop. `Intents` could be added as part
of the series action as well with `ChartSeriesAction.Intent`.

```tsx
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';

import {
  XYChart,
  ChartSeriesAction,
  XYChartDotSeriesActionItem,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { SimpleTable } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/tables';
import { DatabaseIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const randomNumbersDates = [
  { seriesName: 'First Series', ax0: 13.12, ay0: '2022-03-04' },

  { seriesName: 'First Series', ax0: 27.52, ay0: '2022-06-10' },
  { seriesName: 'First Series', ax0: 20.74, ay0: '2022-01-19' },
  { seriesName: 'First Series', ax0: 44.99, ay0: '2022-08-21' },
  { seriesName: 'First Series', ax0: 26.78, ay0: '2022-04-13' },

  { seriesName: 'First Series', ax0: 48.02, ay0: '2022-04-11' },

  { seriesName: 'First Series', ax0: 19.91, ay0: '2022-04-25' },

  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 27.8, ay1: '2022-05-05' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 39.29, ay1: '2022-02-25' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 31.75, ay1: '2022-07-28' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 38.51, ay1: '2022-08-12' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 50.76, ay1: '2022-02-07' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 33.95, ay1: '2022-02-21' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 43.89, ay1: '2022-08-14' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 20.93, ay1: '2022-11-13' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 41.31, ay1: '2022-06-02' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 37.65, ay1: '2022-04-10' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 31.75, ay1: '2022-07-30' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 37.47, ay1: '2022-11-12' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 49.76, ay1: '2022-03-08' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 20.34, ay1: '2022-07-24' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 48.86, ay1: '2022-08-06' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 23.53, ay1: '2022-09-01' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 29.68, ay1: '2022-05-14' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 22.41, ay1: '2022-08-13' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 25.45, ay1: '2022-05-09' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 45.01, ay1: '2022-04-06' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 42.9, ay1: '2022-01-10' },
  { seriesName: 'Second Series', ax1: 25.35, ay1: '2022-08-25' },
];

const SeriesActions = () => {
  const [selectedCell, setSelectedCell] =
    useState<XYChartDotSeriesActionItem>();

  const columns = [
    { id: 'key', header: 'Key', accessor: 'key' },
    {
      id: 'value',
      header: 'Value',
      accessor: 'value',
    },
  ];

  const data = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedCell) {
      const { value, x0, y0, name, ...rest } = selectedCell;
      const tableData = [
        { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
        { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
        { key: 'name', value: name },
        { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
      ];

      return [...tableData];
    }
    return [];
  }, [selectedCell]);

  return (
    <>
      <XYChart data={[]} colorPalette="categorical">
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          data={randomNumbersDates}
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="ax0"
          y0Accessor="ay0"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
          actions={(selectedCell) => {
            return (
              <ChartSeriesAction>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Item
                  onSelect={() => {
                    setSelectedCell(selectedCell);
                  }}
                >
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  Inspect this Dot datapoint
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Intent
                  payload={{ 'dt.query': 'describe logs' }}
                  options={{
                    keyProperties: [],
                  }}
                >
                  Open with…
                </ChartSeriesAction.Intent>
              </ChartSeriesAction>
            );
          }}
        />
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          data={randomNumbersDates}
          color="green"
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="ax1"
          y0Accessor="ay1"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
          actions={(selectedCell) => {
            return (
              <ChartSeriesAction>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Item
                  onSelect={() => {
                    setSelectedCell(selectedCell);
                  }}
                >
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  Inspect this Dot datapoint
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>

                <ChartSeriesAction.Item disabled onSelect={() => void 0}>
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <DatabaseIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  A disabled action
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
              </ChartSeriesAction>
            );
          }}
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="time" position="left" />
      </XYChart>
      {selectedCell && (
        <>
          <h4>Selected Series: {selectedCell.name}</h4>
          <SimpleTable columns={columns} data={data} />
        </>
      )}
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
const SeriesActions = () => {
  const [selectedCell, setSelectedCell] =
    useState<XYChartDotSeriesActionItem>();

  const columns = [
    { id: 'key', header: 'Key', accessor: 'key' },
    {
      id: 'value',
      header: 'Value',
      accessor: 'value',
    },
  ];

  const data = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedCell) {
      const { value, x0, y0, name, ...rest } = selectedCell;
      const tableData = [
        { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
        { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
        { key: 'name', value: name },
        { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
      ];

      return [...tableData];
    }
    return [];
  }, [selectedCell]);

  return (
    <>
      <XYChart data={[]} colorPalette="categorical">
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          data={randomNumbersDates}
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="ax0"
          y0Accessor="ay0"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
          actions={(selectedCell) => {
            return (
              <ChartSeriesAction>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Item
                  onSelect={() => {
                    setSelectedCell(selectedCell);
                  }}
                >
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  Inspect this Dot datapoint
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Intent
                  payload={{ 'dt.query': 'describe logs' }}
                  options={{
                    keyProperties: [],
                  }}
                >
                  Open with…
                </ChartSeriesAction.Intent>
              </ChartSeriesAction>
            );
          }}
        />
        <XYChart.DotSeries
          data={randomNumbersDates}
          color="green"
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="ax1"
          y0Accessor="ay1"
          nameAccessor="seriesName"
          actions={(selectedCell) => {
            return (
              <ChartSeriesAction>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Item
                  onSelect={() => {
                    setSelectedCell(selectedCell);
                  }}
                >
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  Inspect this Dot datapoint
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>

                <ChartSeriesAction.Item disabled onSelect={() => void 0}>
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <DatabaseIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  A disabled action
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
              </ChartSeriesAction>
            );
          }}
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="time" position="left" />
      </XYChart>
      {selectedCell && (
        <>
          <h4>Selected Series: {selectedCell.name}</h4>
          <SimpleTable columns={columns} data={data} />
        </>
      )}
    </>
  );
};
```


#### Custom Tooltip

The XYChart component supports custom tooltips via the XYChart.CustomTooltip
subcomponent. This allows you to fully control the content and layout of
tooltips for different series types.

Wrap your custom rendering logic in XYChart.CustomTooltip and use the provided
payload to determine which series is being hovered. You can return any JSX, or
null to hide the tooltip for a specific series. If you return undefined, the
default tooltip will be used.

CodeSandbox Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community
- Import
- Use cases
- Usage
- Data
- Coloring
- Shapes
- Series actions
- Custom Tooltip

```tsx
];

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={stdData}>
      <XYChart.Tooltip>
        {(payload) => {
          if (
            payload.dotPayload &&
            payload.dotPayload.seriesName === 'Second Series'
          ) {
            return (
              <>
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.dotPayload.color}
                  name={payload.dotPayload.seriesName}
                  value={String(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.y0)}
                />
                <section role="list" aria-label="custom-tooltip">
                  <p>
                    This is a custom tooltip for the{' '}
                    {payload.dotPayload.seriesName} made completely by text.
                  </p>
                  <p>
                    The X value for this specific point is{' '}
                    {String(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.x0)}
                    {', '}
                    and the Y value is {String(payload.dotPayload.datapoint.y0)}
                    .
                  </p>
                </section>
              </>
            );
          }
          return null;
        }}
      </XYChart.Tooltip>
      <XYChart.DotSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="ax"
        y0Accessor="ay"
        nameAccessor="seriesName"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis
        id="x-axis"
        type="time"
        position="bottom"
        formatter={dateFormatter}
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

### Props

- XYChart-DotSeries
## DotSeries
The DotSeries is a type of shape that provides a two-dimensional representation
of data in which pairs of values are shown. This shape turns out great for
representing groups of values spread in classes. It can be an essential
component when creating charts such as Scatter and Dot Plots.

OverviewProperties

### XYChart.DotSeries

`XYChart.DotSeries` provides a slot for defining a `DotSeries`.

#### XYChartDotSeriesProps

##### Signature:
`export declare type Props = & & {
 /**
 * Series name.
 * @deprecated - Use nameAccessor instead. This key will be removed in a future release.
 */
 name?: ;
 /**
 * Accessor function to retrieve the data for the x1.
 */
 x1Accessor?: ;
 /**
 * Accessor function to retrieve the data for the y1.
 */
 y1Accessor?: ;
 /**
 * Series ID accessor.
 */
 seriesIdAccessor?: ;
 /**
 * Series name accessor.
 */
 nameAccessor?: ;
 /**
 * Custom actions to be shown in the tooltip and legend.
 * For tooltip, information about the selected datapoint is displayed.
 * For legend, the first parameter returns the first datapoint of the series and the second parameter returns the series object.
 */
 actions?: (datapoint: , series?: ) => ;
 /**
 * Determines the visual appearance of the dot, such as , , , or .
 * @defaultValue
 */
 shape?: ;
};`Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community
- XYChart.DotSeries

---

## XYChart-LineSeries

`/design/data-visualizations/charts/XYChart-LineSeries/`

## LineSeries
A line series chart connects data points with a continuous line, making it easy
to observe changes or trends over 2-variable paired data, helping to reveal
dependencies or correlations (or both). The chart allows for assigning the
variables to both X and Y-axis.

OverviewProperties

### Import

`tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
`

### Use cases

A Line Series Chart in an XY Chart is a tool used for visualizing trends,
relationships, and patterns in data over a continuous range, such as time or
numerical values.

### Usage

To display a Line Series, add the `XYChart.LineSeries` subcomponent within the
`XYChart` component.

This series requires five essential properties that will function as data
accessors:

- `x0Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the start point for the
x-axis baseline.

- `x1Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the end point for the
x-axis baseline. It can be used for all types of axes, except for categorical
ones.

- `y0Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the start point for the
y-axis baseline.

- `y1Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the end point for the
y-axis baseline. It can be used for all types of axes, except for categorical
ones.

- `seriesIdAccessor`: specifies which data should be used as the unique
identifier for each series. This identifier will be used to group data points
belonging to the same series, allowing multiple series per slot.

- `nameAccessor`: indicates what data should be used as the name of the series.

These accessors will extract the specified data from the provided object array
via the `data` property. It’s crucial to note that the accessors are used to
position the data points in the 2-dimensional space; incorrect specification of
any accessor will result in an inability to generate the LineSeries correctly.

Additionally, a `XYChart.LineSeries` will need to be assigned to at least one
x-axis and one y-axis via valid `xAxisId` and `yAxisId` properties. For a more
detailed explanation of the axis configuration, please refer to the
XYChart docs.

The `XYChart.LineSeries` subcomponent includes some other optional properties:
`data`, `colorPalette`, `color`, `actions`, `pointsDisplay` and `curve`.

The `data`, `colorPalette` and `color` properties can be used to overwrite the
`XYChart` component for a specific series.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const data = [
  {
    x0: '2023-03-14',
    x1: '2023-03-15',
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-15',
    x1: '2023-03-16',
    y0: 40,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-16',
    x1: '2023-03-17',
    y0: 0,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-17',
    x1: '2023-03-18',
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-14',
    x1: '2023-03-15',
    y0: 5,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-15',
    x1: '2023-03-16',
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-16',
    x1: '2023-03-17',
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-17',
    x1: '2023-03-18',
    y0: 25,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-14',
    x1: '2023-03-15',
    y0: 0,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Series 3',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-15',
    x1: '2023-03-16',
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Series 3',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-16',
    x1: '2023-03-17',
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Series 3',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-17',
    x1: '2023-03-18',
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Series 3',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-14',
    x1: '2023-03-15',
    y0: -5,
    seriesId: '4',
    name: 'Series 4',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-15',
    x1: '2023-03-16',
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '4',
    name: 'Series 4',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-16',
    x1: '2023-03-17',
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '4',
    name: 'Series 4',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-17',
    x1: '2023-03-18',
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '4',
    name: 'Series 4',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-14',
    x1: '2023-03-15',
    y0: -10,
    seriesId: '5',
    name: 'Series 5',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-15',
    x1: '2023-03-16',
    y0: 0,
    seriesId: '5',
    name: 'Series 5',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-16',
    x1: '2023-03-17',
    y0: 40,
    seriesId: '5',
    name: 'Series 5',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-17',
    x1: '2023-03-18',
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '5',
    name: 'Series 5',
  },
];

const LineSeriesSimple = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={data} height="200px">
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
        yAxisId="y-left-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        x1Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

#### Data

The data provided to the `LineSeries` component via the `data` property will be
used in combination with the accessors of each series.

#### Coloring

By using the `color` and `colorPalette` properties in the `LineSeries` you can
overwrite the coloring from the `XYChart` component. These two properties are
mutually exclusive. For more information about how to use coloring in the chart
you can refer to the XYChart docs.

The `XYChart.LineSeries` subcomponent supports functions for the `color` and
`colorPalette` props to customize coloring per series in case more than one
series is presented in the same slot.

##### Color

The `color` property allows you to set any desired color for the lines of a
specific series.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { Surface } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/layouts';

const data = [
  {

  },
  {

  {

  {

    x1: '2023-01-05',
    y0: 97,
    seriesId: 'Critical',
    name: 'Critical',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-01',
    x1: '2023-01-02',
    y0: 70,
    seriesId: 'High',
    name: 'High',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-02',
    x1: '2023-01-03',
    y0: 75,
    seriesId: 'High',
    name: 'High',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-03',
    x1: '2023-01-04',
    y0: 72,
    seriesId: 'High',
    name: 'High',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-04',
    x1: '2023-01-05',
    y0: 74,
    seriesId: 'High',

  {

    x1: '2023-01-02',

    seriesId: 'Medium',

  },
  {

    x1: '2023-01-03',
    y0: 45,

  },
  {

    x1: '2023-01-04',
    y0: 43,
    seriesId: 'Medium',
    name: 'Medium',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-04',
    x1: '2023-01-05',

    seriesId: 'Medium',

  { x0: '2023-01-02', x1: '2023-01-03', y0: 22, seriesId: 'Low', name: 'Low' },
  { x0: '2023-01-03', x1: '2023-01-04', y0: 25, seriesId: 'Low', name: 'Low' },
  { x0: '2023-01-04', x1: '2023-01-05', y0: 27, seriesId: 'Low', name: 'Low' },
];

const LineSeriesColor = () => {
  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr',
        gap: '1em',
      }}
    >
      <Surface>
        <XYChart data={data} height="200px" colorPalette="security-risk-level">
          <XYChart.LineSeries
            xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
            yAxisId="y-left-axis"
            x0Accessor="x0"
            x1Accessor="x1"
            y0Accessor="y0"
            nameAccessor="name"
            seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
          <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
        </XYChart>
      </Surface>
      <Surface>
        <XYChart data={data} height="200px">
          <XYChart.LineSeries
            xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
            yAxisId="y-left-axis"
            x0Accessor="x0"
            x1Accessor="x1"
            y0Accessor="y0"
            nameAccessor="name"
            seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
            color={({ seriesId }) => (seriesId === 'Critical' ? 'red' : 'blue')}
          />
          <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
          <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
        </XYChart>
      </Surface>
    </div>
  );
};
```

##### Color Rules

`ColorRules` are advanced coloring tools for the chart, allowing you to apply
conditional coloring based on data values. See more details in the
XYChart docs.

#### Series actions

A series action is a creator-defined interaction with a given data point in the
chart. Basic interactions include copying a series name and inspecting the
underlying data of a data point. Series actions support both synchronous and
asynchronous callbacks. In order to enable chart interactions, the
`ChartSeriesAction` subcomponent needs to be appended within the `XYChart`. More
subcomponents can be added within this component, for instance
`ChartSeriesAction.Item`, where you can provide a custom action that will appear
in the legend menu. That action can execute any custom logic in its `onSelect`
callback or get disabled via a `disabled` prop. `Intents` could be added as part
of the series action as well with `ChartSeriesAction.Intent`.

```tsx
import { useMemo, useState, type Dispatch, type SetStateAction } from 'react';

import {
  XYChart,
  ChartSeriesAction,
  type XYChartLineSeriesActionItem,
  type SeriesActionsTemplate,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { SimpleTable } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/tables';
import { DatabaseIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const data = [
  {
    x0: '2023-01-01',
    x1: '2023-01-02',
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: 'Muted',
    name: 'Muted',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-02',
    x1: '2023-01-03',
    y0: 12,
    seriesId: 'Muted',
    name: 'Muted',
  },
  {

    x1: '2023-01-04',
    y0: 11,
    seriesId: 'Muted',
    name: 'Muted',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-04',
    x1: '2023-01-05',
    y0: 13,
    seriesId: 'Muted',
    name: 'Muted',
  },

  {
    x0: '2023-01-01',
    x1: '2023-01-02',
    y0: 95,
    seriesId: 'Critical',
    name: 'Critical',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-02',
    x1: '2023-01-03',
    y0: 100,
    seriesId: 'Critical',
    name: 'Critical',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-03',
    x1: '2023-01-04',
    y0: 98,
    seriesId: 'Critical',
    name: 'Critical',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-04',
    x1: '2023-01-05',
    y0: 97,
    seriesId: 'Critical',
    name: 'Critical',
  },

  {
    x0: '2023-01-01',
    x1: '2023-01-02',
    y0: 70,
    seriesId: 'High',

];

const asyncData = [
  {
    x0: '2023-01-06',
    x1: '2023-01-07',
    y0: 70,
    seriesId: 'Affected',
    name: 'Affected',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-07',
    x1: '2023-01-08',
    y0: 75,
    seriesId: 'Affected',
    name: 'Affected',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-08',
    x1: '2023-01-09',
    y0: 72,
    seriesId: 'Affected',
    name: 'Affected',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-09',
    x1: '2023-01-10',
    y0: 74,
    seriesId: 'Affected',
    name: 'Affected',
  },

  {
    x0: '2023-01-06',
    x1: '2023-01-07',
    y0: 40,
    seriesId: 'Resolved',
    name: 'Resolved',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-07',
    x1: '2023-01-08',
    y0: 45,
    seriesId: 'Resolved',
    name: 'Resolved',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-08',
    x1: '2023-01-09',
    y0: 43,
    seriesId: 'Resolved',
    name: 'Resolved',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-09',
    x1: '2023-01-10',
    y0: 41,
    seriesId: 'Resolved',
    name: 'Resolved',
  },

  {
    x0: '2023-01-06',
    x1: '2023-01-07',
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: 'MutedAsync',
    name: 'Muted',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-07',
    x1: '2023-01-08',
    y0: 22,
    seriesId: 'MutedAsync',
    name: 'Muted',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-08',
    x1: '2023-01-09',
    y0: 25,
    seriesId: 'MutedAsync',
    name: 'Muted',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-01-09',
    x1: '2023-01-10',
    y0: 27,
    seriesId: 'MutedAsync',
    name: 'Muted',
  },
];

const chartSeriesAction = (
  action: XYChartLineSeriesActionItem,
  setter: Dispatch<SetStateAction<XYChartLineSeriesActionItem | undefined>>,
  isAsync = false
) => {
  return (
    <ChartSeriesAction>
      <ChartSeriesAction.Item
        key={action.name}
        onSelect={() => {
          setter(action);
        }}
      >
        <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
          <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
        </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
        Inspect data point {isAsync ? '(async)' : ''}
      </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
      <ChartSeriesAction.Item disabled onSelect={() => void 0}>
        <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
          <DatabaseIcon />
        </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
        A disabled action
      </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
    </ChartSeriesAction>
  );
};

const handleSeriesActions = (
  lineSeriesItem: XYChartLineSeriesActionItem,
  setter: Dispatch<SetStateAction<XYChartLineSeriesActionItem | undefined>>,
  isAsync: boolean
): SeriesActionsTemplate => {
  if (isAsync) {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        resolve(chartSeriesAction(lineSeriesItem, setter, true));
      }, 500);
    });
  }

  return chartSeriesAction(lineSeriesItem, setter);
};

const SeriesActions = () => {
  const [selectedCell, setSelectedCell] =
    useState<XYChartLineSeriesActionItem>();

  const columns = [
    { id: 'key', header: 'Key', accessor: 'key' },
    {
      id: 'value',
      header: 'Value',
      accessor: 'value',
    },
  ];

  const tableData = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedCell) {
      const { value, x0, x1, y0, name, ...rest } = selectedCell;
      const tableDataStruct = [
        { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
        { key: 'x1', value: x1 },
        { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
        { key: 'name ', value: name },
        { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
      ];

      return [...tableDataStruct];
    }
    return [];
  }, [selectedCell]);

  return (
    <>
      <XYChart data={[]} colorPalette="categorical">
        <XYChart.LineSeries
          data={data}
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="x0"
          x1Accessor="x1"
          y0Accessor="y0"
          nameAccessor="name"
          seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
          actions={(datapoint) =>
            handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, false)
          }
        />
        <XYChart.LineSeries
          data={asyncData}
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="x0"
          x1Accessor="x1"
          y0Accessor="y0"
          nameAccessor="name"
          seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
          actions={(datapoint) =>
            handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, true)
          }
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
      </XYChart>
      {selectedCell && (
        <>
          <h4>Selected Series: {selectedCell.name}</h4>
          <SimpleTable columns={columns} data={tableData} />
        </>
      )}
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
const SeriesActions = () => {
  const [selectedCell, setSelectedCell] =
    useState<XYChartLineSeriesActionItem>();

  const columns = [
    { id: 'key', header: 'Key', accessor: 'key' },
    {
      id: 'value',
      header: 'Value',
      accessor: 'value',
    },
  ];

  const tableData = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedCell) {
      const { value, x0, x1, y0, name, ...rest } = selectedCell;
      const tableDataStruct = [
        { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
        { key: 'x1', value: x1 },
        { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
        { key: 'name ', value: name },
        { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
      ];

      return [...tableDataStruct];
    }

  }, [selectedCell]);

  return (
    <>
      <XYChart data={[]} colorPalette="categorical">
        <XYChart.LineSeries
          data={data}
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="x0"
          x1Accessor="x1"
          y0Accessor="y0"

        <XYChart.LineSeries
          data={asyncData}
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="x0"
          x1Accessor="x1"
          y0Accessor="y0"
          nameAccessor="name"
          seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"

            handleSeriesActions(datapoint, setSelectedCell, true)
```
