```tsx
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
      </XYChart>
      {selectedCell && (
        <>
          <h4>Selected Series: {selectedCell.name}</h4>
          <SimpleTable columns={columns} data={tableData} />
        </>
      )}
    </>
  );
};
```


#### Points Display

The `pointsDisplay` prop allows you to customize when data points are shown on
the line: `never` hides all points, `always` displays all points, and `auto`
(default) shows points based on a ratio between density of points for the
current series and the chart's width.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const alwaysData = [
  {
    x0: 5,
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Always (resize to check)',
  },
  {
    x0: 10,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Always (resize to check)',
  },
  {
    x0: 15,
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Always (resize to check)',
  },
  {
    x0: 20,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Always (resize to check)',
  },
];

const neverData = [
  {
    x0: 5,
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Never',
  },
  {
    x0: 10,
    y0: 25,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Never',
  },
  {
    x0: 15,
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Never',
  },
  {
    x0: 20,
    y0: 25,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Never',
  },
];

const autoData = [
  {
    x0: 5,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 10,
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 15,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 20,
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 25,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 30,
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 35,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 40,
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 45,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Auto (default)',
  },
];

const PointsDisplay = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]} height="200px" colorPalette="apdex">
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={autoData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
        nameAccessor="name"
      />
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={alwaysData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
        nameAccessor="name"
        pointsDisplay="always"
      />
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={neverData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
        nameAccessor="name"
        pointsDisplay="never"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const alwaysData = [
  {
    x0: 5,
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Always (resize to check)',
  },

    x0: 10,
    y0: 15,

  },

  },

  },
];

const neverData = [
  {
    x0: 5,
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Never',
  },
  {
    x0: 10,
    y0: 25,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Never',
  },
  {

    name: 'Never',
  },

  {
    x0: 5,

    seriesId: '3',

  },

    y0: 20,

      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={alwaysData}

      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={neverData}

        y0Accessor="y0"

        nameAccessor="name"
        pointsDisplay="never"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-first-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-first-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>

};
```

#### Series curve

You can select the curve shape of the `LineSeries` via the `curve` prop. The
available options are `linear` where line joins will be straight (default
option) or `smooth` for a more fluid curve.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const smoothData = [
  {
    x0: 5,
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Smooth',
  },
  {
    x0: 10,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Smooth',
  },
  {
    x0: 15,
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Smooth',
  },
  {
    x0: 20,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Smooth',
  },
];

const autoData = [
  {
    x0: 15,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Linear (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 20,
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Linear (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 25,
    y0: 15,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Linear (default)',
  },
  {
    x0: 30,
    y0: 20,
    seriesId: '3',
    name: 'Linear (default)',
  },
];

const SeriesCurve = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={[]} height="200px" colorPalette="fireplace">
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={autoData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
        nameAccessor="name"
      />
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        data={smoothData}
        xAxisId="x-first-axis"
        yAxisId="y-first-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
        nameAccessor="name"
        pointsDisplay="always"
        curve="smooth"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis
        id="x-first-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="bottom"
        max={35}
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis
        id="y-first-axis"
        type="numerical"
        position="left"
        max={30}
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

```tsx
const smoothData = [

```


#### Custom Tooltip

The XYChart component supports custom tooltips via the XYChart.CustomTooltip
subcomponent. This allows you to fully control the content and layout of
tooltips for different series types.

Wrap your custom rendering logic in XYChart.CustomTooltip and use the provided
payload to determine which series is being hovered. You can return any JSX, or
null to hide the tooltip for a specific series. If you return undefined, the
default tooltip will be used.

CodeSandbox Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community
- Import
- Use cases
- Usage
- Data
- Coloring
- Series actions
- Points Display
- Series curve
- Custom Tooltip

```tsx
import { ChartTooltip, XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const data = [
  {
    x0: '2023-03-14',
    x1: '2023-03-15',
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-15',
    x1: '2023-03-16',
    y0: 40,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-16',
    x1: '2023-03-17',
    y0: 0,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-17',
    x1: '2023-03-18',
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '1',
    name: 'Series 1',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-14',
    x1: '2023-03-15',
    y0: 5,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-15',
    x1: '2023-03-16',
    y0: 30,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-16',
    x1: '2023-03-17',
    y0: 10,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
  {
    x0: '2023-03-17',
    x1: '2023-03-18',
    y0: 25,
    seriesId: '2',
    name: 'Series 2',
  },
];

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={data} height="200px">
      <XYChart.Tooltip>
        {(payload) => {
          if (
            payload.linePayload &&
            payload.linePayload.seriesName === 'Series 2'
          ) {
            const { x0, y0 } = payload.linePayload.datapoint;
            return (
              <div
                role="list"
                aria-label="custom-tooltip"
                style={{ padding: '8px 12px' }}
              >
                <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
                  color={payload.linePayload.color}
                  name={payload.linePayload.seriesName}
                  value={String(payload.linePayload.datapoint.y0)}
                />
                <section style={{ marginTop: '8px', fontSize: '12px' }}>
                  <p style={{ margin: '0 0 4px 0' }}>Start: {String(x0)}</p>
                  <p style={{ margin: 0 }}>Value: {String(y0)}</p>
                </section>
              </div>
            );
          }
          return undefined;
        }}
      </XYChart.Tooltip>
      <XYChart.LineSeries
        xAxisId="x-bottom-axis"
        yAxisId="y-left-axis"
        x0Accessor="x0"
        x1Accessor="x1"
        y0Accessor="y0"
        nameAccessor="name"
        seriesIdAccessor="seriesId"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-bottom-axis" type="time" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-left-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

### Props

- XYChart-LineSeries
## LineSeries
A line series chart connects data points with a continuous line, making it easy
to observe changes or trends over 2-variable paired data, helping to reveal
dependencies or correlations (or both). The chart allows for assigning the
variables to both X and Y-axis.

OverviewProperties

### XYChart.LineSeries

`XYChart.LineSeries` provides a slot for defining a `LineSeries`.

#### XYChartLineSeriesProps

##### Signature:
`export declare type Props = & & {
 /**
 * Accessor function to retrieve the data for the x1.
 */
 x1Accessor?: ;
 /**
 * Accessor function to retrieve the data for the y1.
 */
 y1Accessor?: ;
 /**
 * Series ID accessor.
 */
 seriesIdAccessor: ;
 /**
 * Series name accessor.
 */
 nameAccessor: ;
 /**
 * Custom actions to be shown in the tooltip and legend.
 * For tooltip, information about the selected datapoint is displayed.
 * For legend, the first parameter returns the first datapoint of the series and the second parameter returns the series object.
 */
 actions?: (datapoint: , series?: ) => ;
 /**
 * Show the datapoints always, or auto based on a threshold amount.
 * @defaultValue
 */
 pointsDisplay?: ;
 /**
 * Line interpolation curve type
 */
 curve?: ;
};`Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community
- XYChart.LineSeries

---

## XYChart-RectSeries

`/design/data-visualizations/charts/XYChart-RectSeries/`

## RectSeries
A `RectSeries` is a type of shape that provides a two-dimensional representation
of data in which various values are represented by colors. This shape excels at
allowing the user to compare values and observe patterns. One of the most
popular uses this shape can be used for are HeatMaps.

OverviewProperties

### Import

`tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
`

### Use cases

A Rect series visualizes data as colored rectangles and is used to create charts
like heatmaps, Gantt charts, or availability charts.

##### Heatmap

```tsx
const RectHeatmap = () => {

    <XYChart data={userActivityData}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        y1Accessor="horizontal.end"

        valueAccessorLabel="Temperature"

        position="bottom"
        label="Day of the week"
      />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="time" position="left" label="Hours" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```

##### Gantt chart

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const ganttData = [
  {
    task: 'Design',
    start: new Date('2024-06-01T08:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-03T17:00:00'),
    complexity: 'Mid',
  },
  {
    task: 'Development',
    start: new Date('2024-06-02T09:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-06T18:00:00'),
    complexity: 'High',
  },
  {
    task: 'Testing',
    start: new Date('2024-06-05T10:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-08T16:00:00'),
    complexity: 'Mid',
  },
  {
    task: 'Deployment',
    start: new Date('2024-06-09T09:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-10T12:00:00'),
    complexity: 'Low',
  },
];

const RectGantt = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={ganttData}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="start"
        x1Accessor="end"
        y0Accessor="task"
        valueAccessor="complexity"
        valueAccessorLabel="Complexity"
        colorPalette="categorical"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="time" position="bottom" label="Date" />
      <XYChart.YAxis
        id="y-axis"
        type="categorical"
        position="left"
        label="Task"
      />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


##### Availability chart

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const availabilityData = [
  // Pipeline A
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline A',
    start: new Date('2024-06-01T00:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-01T10:00:00'),
    status: 'Uptime',
  },
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline A',
    start: new Date('2024-06-01T10:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-01T14:00:00'),
    status: 'Downtime',
  },
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline A',
    start: new Date('2024-06-01T14:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-02T03:00:00'),
    status: 'Uptime',
  },
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline A',
    start: new Date('2024-06-02T03:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-02T08:00:00'),
    status: 'Downtime',
  },
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline A',
    start: new Date('2024-06-02T08:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-03T00:00:00'),
    status: 'Uptime',
  },
  // Pipeline B
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline B',
    start: new Date('2024-06-01T00:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-01T06:00:00'),
    status: 'Downtime',
  },
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline B',
    start: new Date('2024-06-01T06:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-01T20:00:00'),
    status: 'Uptime',
  },
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline B',
    start: new Date('2024-06-01T20:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-02T02:00:00'),
    status: 'Downtime',
  },
  {
    pipeline: 'Pipeline B',
    start: new Date('2024-06-02T02:00:00'),
    end: new Date('2024-06-03T00:00:00'),
    status: 'Uptime',
  },
];

const RectAvailabilityChart = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={availabilityData}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="start"
        x1Accessor="end"
        y0Accessor="pipeline"
        valueAccessor="status"
        valueAccessorLabel="Status"
        colorPalette={{
          Uptime: '#27ae60', // green
          Downtime: '#e74c3c', // red
        }}
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="time" position="bottom" label="Time" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="categorical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


### Usage

To display a `RectSeries`, add the `XYChart.RectSeries` subcomponent within the
`XYChart` component.

This series requires five essential properties that will function as data
accessors:

- `x0Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the start point for the
x-axis baseline.

- `x1Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the end point for the
x-axis baseline. Not required for categorical-type axes.

- `y0Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the start point for the
y-axis baseline.

- `y1Accessor`: indicates what data should be used as the end point for the
y-axis baseline. Not required for categorical-type axes.

- `valueAccessor`: indicates what data should be used as the tile value, which
represents the intensity of the tile color.

These accessors will extract the specified data from the provided object array
via the `data` property. It’s crucial to note that the accessors are used to
construct each cell’s dimensions; incorrect specification of any accessor will
result in an inability to generate the correct rect series.

Additionally, a `XYChart.RectSeries` will need to be assigned to at least one
x-axis and one y-axis via valid `xAxisId` and `yAxisId` properties. For a more
detailed explanation of the axis configuration, please refer to the
XYChart docs.

The `XYChart.RectSeries` subcomponent includes some other optional properties:
`data`, `colorPalette`, `valueAccessorLabel`, `valueUnit`, `valueFormatter`,
`valueMin`, `valueMax` and `actions`.

The `data` and `colorPalette` properties can be used to overwrite the `XYChart`
component for a specific series.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const standardData = [
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-01', end: '2023-01-02' },
    value: 75000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-02', end: '2023-01-03' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-03', end: '2023-01-04' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-04', end: '2023-01-05' },
    value: 45000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-05', end: '2023-01-06' },
    value: 65000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 50 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-06', end: '2023-01-07' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 50, end: 100 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-01', end: '2023-01-02' },
    value: 75000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 50, end: 100 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-02', end: '2023-01-03' },
    value: 35000,
  },
  {

    vertical: { start: '2023-01-03', end: '2023-01-04' },
    value: 35000,
  },
  {

    value: 45000,
  },
  {

    vertical: { start: '2023-01-05', end: '2023-01-06' },
    value: 30000,
  },
  {

    vertical: { start: '2023-01-06', end: '2023-01-07' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {

    vertical: { start: '2023-01-01', end: '2023-01-02' },
    value: 55000,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 100, end: 150 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-02', end: '2023-01-03' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {

    value: 20000,
  },
  {

    value: 45000,
  },
  {

    value: 45000,

    value: 20000,

    value: 75000,
  },
  {

    vertical: { start: '2023-01-02', end: '2023-01-03' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 150, end: 200 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-03', end: '2023-01-04' },
    value: 35000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 150, end: 200 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-04', end: '2023-01-05' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 150, end: 200 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-05', end: '2023-01-06' },
    value: 45000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 150, end: 200 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-06', end: '2023-01-07' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-01', end: '2023-01-02' },
    value: 55000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-02', end: '2023-01-03' },
    value: 35000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-03', end: '2023-01-04' },
    value: 65000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-04', end: '2023-01-05' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-05', end: '2023-01-06' },
    value: 75000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 200, end: 250 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-06', end: '2023-01-07' },
    value: 45000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-01', end: '2023-01-02' },
    value: 30000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-02', end: '2023-01-03' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-03', end: '2023-01-04' },
    value: 65000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-04', end: '2023-01-05' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-05', end: '2023-01-06' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-06', end: '2023-01-07' },
    value: 30000,
  },
];

const RectSimple = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={standardData}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
      />
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal2.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal2.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical2.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical2.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
        colorPalette="pink"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="time" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Data

The data provided to the `RectSeries` component via the `data` property will be
used in combination with the accessors of each series.

#### Coloring

By using the `colorPalette` property in the `RectSeries` you can overwrite the
coloring from the `XYChart` component. For more information about how to use
coloring in the chart you can refer to the XYChart docs.

##### Color Rules

`ColorRules` are advanced coloring tools for the chart, allowing you to apply
conditional coloring based on data values. See more details in the
XYChart docs.

##### Overlapping tiles

The sides of the tiles can be defined freely, in case of overlapping amongst two
or more tiles, these will transparent through one another and show a mixed
color.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const standardData = [
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 3 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-01', end: '2023-01-03' },
    value: 4,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 0, end: 3 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-03', end: '2023-01-05' },
    value: 2,
  },
  {
    horizontal: { start: 2, end: 6 },
    vertical: { start: '2023-01-02', end: '2023-01-04' },
    value: 1,
  },
];

const OverlappingTiles = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={standardData}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="time" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


##### Min and max values

By setting the `valueMin` and `valueMax` properties, you can establish
boundaries for all values. Values outside these boundaries will display a
default color. Note that string values are not affected by these boundaries and
will display their original color.

```tsx
import { XYChart } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';

const standardData = [
  {
    horizontal: {
      start: 0,
      end: 50,

      end: 2,

      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
        valueMin={35000}
        valueMax={60000}
      />

      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Value Label

Given the `valueAccessor` depends on how the data is named and structured, the
final result can be complicated to understand for the user. By using the
property `valueAccessorLabel` any name can be set in order to identify the
value.

#### Unit and formatter

You can apply a unit and formatter to the data extracted by the `valueAccessor`
via `valueUnit` and `valueFormatter` as long as it is of type number. If the
data is of type string then these properties will be disregarded.

```tsx
    horizontal: {
      start: 250,
      end: 300,
    },
    vertical: {
      start: 10,
      end: 12,
    },
    value: 30000,
  },
];

const ValueAccessorFormatter = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={standardData}>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
        valueFormatter={{
          input: units.length.centimeter,
          output: units.length.meter,
        }}
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="numerical" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


#### Series actions

A series action is a creator-defined interaction with a given data point in the
chart. Basic interactions include copying a series name and inspecting the
underlying data of a data point. Series actions support both synchronous and
asynchronous callbacks. In order to enable chart interactions, the
`ChartSeriesAction` subcomponent needs to be appended within the `XYChart`. More
subcomponents can be added within this component, for instance
`ChartSeriesAction.Item`, where you can provide a custom action that will appear
in the legend menu. That action can execute any custom logic in its `onSelect`
callback or get disabled via a `disabled` prop. `Intents` could be added as part
of the series action as well with `ChartSeriesAction.Intent`.

```tsx
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';

import {
  XYChart,
  XYChartRectSeriesActionItem,
  ChartSeriesAction,
} from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
import { SimpleTable } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/tables';
import { DatabaseIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@dynatrace/strato-icons';

const categoricalDataset = [
  {
    amountRange: { start: 0, end: -10 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person1' },
    events: 'Error',
  },
  {
    amountRange: { start: 0, end: -10 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person2' },
    events: 'Info',
  },
  {
    amountRange: { start: 0, end: -10 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person3' },
    events: 'Warning',
  },
  {
    amountRange: { start: 0, end: -10 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person4' },
    events: 'Warning',
  },
  {
    amountRange: { start: -10, end: -20 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person1' },
    events: 'Error',
  },
  {
    amountRange: { start: -10, end: -20 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person2' },
    events: 'Error',
  },
  {
    amountRange: { start: -10, end: -20 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person3' },
    events: 'Warning',
  },
  {
    amountRange: { start: -10, end: -20 },
    peopleRange: { start: 'Person4' },
    events: 'Info',
  },
];

const SeriesActions = () => {
  const [selectedTile, setSelectedTile] =
    useState<XYChartRectSeriesActionItem>();

  const columns = [
    { id: 'key', header: 'Key', accessor: 'key' },
    {
      id: 'value',
      header: 'Value',
      accessor: 'value',
    },
  ];

  const data = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedTile) {
      const { value, x0, x1, y0, y1, ...rest } = selectedTile;
      const tableData = [
        { key: 'x0', value: x0 },
        { key: 'x1', value: x1 },
        { key: 'y0', value: y0 },
        { key: 'y1', value: y1 },
        { key: 'Value', value: value },
        { key: 'Rest', value: JSON.stringify(rest) },
      ];

      return [...tableData];
    }
    return [];
  }, [selectedTile]);

  return (
    <>
      <XYChart data={categoricalDataset} colorPalette="categorical">
        <XYChart.RectSeries
          xAxisId="x-axis"
          yAxisId="y-axis"
          x0Accessor="amountRange.start"
          x1Accessor="amountRange.end"
          y0Accessor="peopleRange.start"
          valueAccessor="events"
          actions={(selectedCell) => {
            return (
              <ChartSeriesAction>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Item
                  onSelect={() => {
                    setSelectedTile(selectedCell);
                  }}
                >
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <MagnifyingGlassIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  Inspect the tile
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
                <ChartSeriesAction.Item disabled onSelect={() => void 0}>
                  <ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                    <DatabaseIcon />
                  </ChartSeriesAction.ItemIcon>
                  A disabled action
                </ChartSeriesAction.Item>
              </ChartSeriesAction>
            );
          }}
        />
        <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
        <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="categorical" position="left" />
      </XYChart>
      {selectedTile && (
        <>
          <h4>Selected Series</h4>
          <SimpleTable columns={columns} data={data} />
        </>
      )}
    </>
  );
};
```


#### Custom Tooltip

The XYChart component supports custom tooltips via the XYChart.CustomTooltip
subcomponent. This allows you to fully control the content and layout of
tooltips for different series types.

Wrap your custom rendering logic in XYChart.CustomTooltip and use the provided
payload to determine which series is being hovered. You can return any JSX, or
null to hide the tooltip for a specific series. If you return undefined, the
default tooltip will be used.

CodeSandbox Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community

- Use cases
- Usage
- Data
- Coloring
- Value Label
- Unit and formatter
- Series actions
- Custom Tooltip

```tsx
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-03', end: '2023-01-04' },
    value: 65000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-04', end: '2023-01-05' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-05', end: '2023-01-06' },
    value: 20000,
  },
  {
    horizontal2: { start: 250, end: 300 },
    vertical2: { start: '2023-01-06', end: '2023-01-07' },
    value: 30000,
  },
];

const customTooltip = (payload: XYChartTooltipPayload) => {
  if (payload.rectPayload && payload.rectPayload.seriesName === 'Series 2') {
    const { color, seriesName } = payload.rectPayload;
    const { x0, x1, y0, y1, value } = payload.rectPayload.datapoint;
    return (
      <>
        <ChartTooltip.SeriesHeader
          seriesLabel={seriesName}
          valueLabel="Value"
        />
        <ChartTooltip.SeriesItem
          color={color}
          name={`[${String(x0)} – ${String(x1)}] × [${String(y0)} – ${String(
            y1
          )}]`}
          value={String(value)}
        />
      </>
    );
  }
  return null;
};

const CustomTooltip = () => {
  return (
    <XYChart data={standardData}>
      <XYChart.Tooltip>{customTooltip}</XYChart.Tooltip>
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
      />
      <XYChart.RectSeries
        xAxisId="x-axis"
        yAxisId="y-axis"
        x0Accessor="horizontal2.start"
        x1Accessor="horizontal2.end"
        y0Accessor="vertical2.start"
        y1Accessor="vertical2.end"
        valueAccessor="value"
        colorPalette="pink"
      />
      <XYChart.XAxis id="x-axis" type="numerical" position="bottom" />
      <XYChart.YAxis id="y-axis" type="time" position="left" />
    </XYChart>
  );
};
```


### Props

- XYChart-RectSeries
## RectSeries
A `RectSeries` is a type of shape that provides a two-dimensional representation
of data in which various values are represented by colors. This shape excels at
allowing the user to compare values and observe patterns. One of the most
popular uses this shape can be used for are HeatMaps.

OverviewProperties

### XYChart.RectSeries

`XYChart.RectSeries` provides a slot for defining a `RectSeries`.

#### XYChartRectSeriesProps
extends |
 | Name | Type | Default | Description
 | `x1Accessor?` | | | Accessor function to retrieve the data for the x1.
 | `y1Accessor?` | | | Accessor function to retrieve the data for the y1.
 | `valueAccessor` | | | Accessor function to retrieve the data for the value.
 | `valueAccessorLabel?` | | | A custom label to overwrite the valueAccessor when naming the value
 | `valueMin?` | | | If specified, all values coming from the valueAccessor that are under this number will display a default color.
Doesn't apply for category values.
 | `valueMax?` | | | If specified, all values coming from the valueAccessor that are above this number will display a default color.
Doesn't apply for category values.
 | `valueFormatter?` | | | | If specified, the value coming from the valueAccessor will be formatted with given formatter options.
Doesn't apply for string values.
 | `valueUnit?` | | | A custom unit to be displayed in the Legend for number values
 | `actions?` | (datapoint: , series?: ) => | | Custom actions to be shown in the tooltip and legend.
For tooltip, information about the selected datapoint is displayed.
For legend, the first parameter returns the first datapoint of the series and the second parameter returns the series object.Still have questions?Find answers in the Dynatrace Community
- XYChart.RectSeries

---

## convertToTimeseries

`/design/data-visualizations/charts/convertToTimeseries/`

The `convertToTimeseries` function takes a set of Grail records and converts it
to `Timeseries` which can be used for charting.

### Import

`tsx
import { convertToTimeseries } from '@dynatrace/strato-components/charts';
`

### Use cases

Pass an array in the format of `RangedFieldTypes` and dataset in the format of
`ResultRecord` and receive an array of `Timeseries` data.

#### Exclude fields from being converted

The parameter `hiddenFieldIds` provides a way to specify a list of field ids
that should not be converted.
